name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: One week left - we're on the clock
body:
We need you now | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb1ba7675a18/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4928978?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

We are one week away from **_June 30th,_**_ our end-of-the-quarter fundraising deadline_ – and this one is critical.

**Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and the radical liberals have been working around the clock to take away our freedom and way of life.** We've seen them leave our southern border wide open, try to defund our police officers, federalize our elections to keep themselves in power, and bring critical race theory to our children's schools.

**And they want to take away your voice so they can keep their power and majority in 2022. **

**_We are not going to let that happen._**

We need to organize and get dedicated Americans like yourself, ready to defend our country from their socialist attacks on our economy, our police, our children’s education, and America’s future.

With the deadline quickly approaching, **I want to have a dedicated list of trusted patriots who are ready to fight back – will I see your name on that list?**

[**_> >> I am looking for 30 of my closest supporters to rush $25, $45 or $75 to defend our nation. Can I count on you to help us reach this important goal? <<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=c69303ca9a&e=13f35c4add)

Nancy Pelosi is terrified of the momentum we’ve been building; she wants to see us fail. That’s why we need all hands-on deck to **fire Pelosi and prove her and the DCCC wrong.**

Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---
| [DONATE](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=05e83804c0&e=13f35c4add "DONATE")

CLARENCE, NY 14031

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Help us Mobilize MAGA Nation!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
The fight for the future of our Republic is upon us. We need every America First patriot we can muster to come together to help mobilize MAGA Nation!
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=1&v=13)

| Peter, Thank you for stepping up!

The fight for the future of our Republic is upon us. We need every America First patriot we can muster to come together to help mobilize MAGA Nation! Folks like **YOU** are the lifeblood of my campaign, and I’m grateful for each and every ounce of energy or moment of your time that you’re able to contribute. **_Here are three ways you can get involved TODAY without leaving your house:_**
1. Add a *Fearless Fighter* frame to your Facebook profile by [**visiting this link**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rbkmDOYI5NuQZ-HzmdwgCkxjXWi8K6QPH79zQTcIdgz&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=2&v=13) , searching for “Mo Brooks,” and clicking “Use as Profile Picture”
2. Add your name, a short endorsement, and photo (optional) to our official campaign [**Endorsement Map**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG6IAoZTCnP7t4ZwFsRajdfqRHaZyY6Q0nj35qW9Ym3Z9&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=3&v=13)
3. Grab some *Fearless Fighter* campaign merchandise at our [**Online Store**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RmElo3CpG5JLAd3wnMvy2QQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=4&v=13) to show your support

_Of course, if you’re not following our campaign on social media yet, give us a LIKE or FOLLOW and invite your friends to do the same!_ [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sJAQfbjrgl12zjz4yECp3EspAYwyHliJnJgvrx2-6Fd&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=5&v=13)[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvQpzdP2h-MkR1RgQ68Ld6g&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=6&v=13)[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73ywFhIE26WWSjD3TNoGUDBzia_kzxi5tBV9Tsc_bUXyj_&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer&n=7&v=13) This race is just getting started, but in politics, momentum is EVERYTHING. Keep an eye out for more opportunities to get involved coming soon! For the next generation, Mo Brooks

name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Dems Are Doing a Great Deal of Damage to Our Country
body:
Is there anything we can do? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Dems Are Doing a Great Deal of Damage to Our Country](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats currently control the House, the Senate, and the White House. And they're doing a lot of damage with that power. It's past time we fight back. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Mainstream Press Gets it Wrong Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-d/)
Remember when the mainstream press blamed Donald Trump for tear-gassing protesters to do a photo op? Well he didn't. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Lies and Deception](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Chinese Communist Party has been lying about the Tiananmen Square Massacre for the last 32 years. Now they're lying about the origins of COVID-19 (and more.) You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Biden's Budget Busting Boondoggle](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlhjyhkd-kujkulhluu-n/)
President Biden just released his budget. It's a disaster. You can read the bad news here (if you can stomach it.) name: James Carville
subject: Stop Glenn Trumpkin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Trump’s endorsement is a wake up call for all of us.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31311213/292260322/-2023814932?refcode=20210624.1_JC_BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhZWYzZS1lY2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUKasDnir9yhWNlKJVj1QbxYvdTUJNwUUfCp2Kqye9k=)

| | Derek,

I’m going to level with you: Trump-backed candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, poses the biggest threat to Virginia’s progress in a generation.

If he wins, that’s the ball game. Everything from Virginia’s health care to our freedom to vote will be in danger.

Derek, we have to make sure Terry McAuliffe has everything he needs to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin.

**[Terry is looking for 10,000 donations before the end of June -- can you chip in right now and do your part?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31311214/292260323/1097049879?refcode=20210624.1_JC_BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhZWYzZS1lY2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUKasDnir9yhWNlKJVj1QbxYvdTUJNwUUfCp2Kqye9k=)**

Here’s another sad fact. Youngkin winning ain’t just bad for Virginia, it’s a nightmare for America.

Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin and Glenn is shouting that endorsement from the rooftops. In fact, Youngkin is so much like Trump that folks are starting to call him “Glenn Trumpkin.”

Look, I don’t care what you call him. All I care about is what election experts are calling Virginia: 2021’s most important race.

Derek, we worked too damn hard to fire Donald Trump for us to let him resurrect his political career by helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s next Governor.

**[I’m counting on you to do your part to stop them. Youngkin is planning on spending $75 million of his own money to win and any contribution, no matter the amount, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31311215/292260324/1097049879?refcode=20210624.1_JC_BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhZWYzZS1lY2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUKasDnir9yhWNlKJVj1QbxYvdTUJNwUUfCp2Kqye9k=)**

Thanks,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31311216/292260325/-2023814932?refcode=20210624.1_JC_BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhZWYzZS1lY2Q0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUKasDnir9yhWNlKJVj1QbxYvdTUJNwUUfCp2Kqye9k=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: AZ and NH: 2 of the most vulnerable seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Will you split a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's? | | |
---
Friends – I have an important ask to make ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. Next week, we’ll close the books on our biggest deadline yet. It’s our latest opportunity to show our opponents that this campaign is moving full speed ahead. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._ **Last month, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona against us. And in New Hampshire, the same dark-money super PAC unleashed a massive digital ad campaign against Maggie Hassan. National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to try to win back the Senate -- and New Hampshire and Arizona are their top targets.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of these attacks, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our goal of 50,000 contributions. That is why I'm asking for your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better...a team of people like you, who I know will always have our backs. **And if we can hit our 50,000 contribution goal, it’ll show National Republicans that we're ready to defend these seats. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** **[I’m humbly asking if you will split a $5 donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's. subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31325206/292304569/-521710702?gpsid=31_130_19501&refcode=em21_210623_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_v2_sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_v2_sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZiNzMwYi0wMWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zb6IEl4moO36h1lqzh92gDq4zgrfolzhWmkuRF8OG24=)
Peter,

In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our very first FEC fundraising deadline. This is an all-important test of our momentum -- which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain?

Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have chipped in to help.

Democrats have a 50-50 majority in the Senate right now. We need to protect and expand our majority, and that starts by flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeating Ron Johnson. That starts with _you._

It’s going to be a steep climb to raise as much as we can in the next week, but I believe we can do it if enough of us come together over the next few days before we close out the quarter. That’s why I have to ask:

[**Will you add a contribution of $5 or more to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? We need to have a strong FEC report -- especially our first one! -- if we’re going to flip this seat blue and defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. Chip in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31325207/292304570/-521710702?gpsid=31_130_19501&refcode=em21_210623_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_v2_sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_v2_sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZiNzMwYi0wMWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zb6IEl4moO36h1lqzh92gDq4zgrfolzhWmkuRF8OG24=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31325208/292304572/-521710702?gpsid=31_130_19501&refcode=em21_210623_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_v2_sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210623_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_v2_sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZiNzMwYi0wMWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zb6IEl4moO36h1lqzh92gDq4zgrfolzhWmkuRF8OG24=)

clean_body: = Peter, In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our very first FEC fundraising deadline. This is an all-important test of our momentum -- which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain? Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have chipped in to help. Democrats have a 50-50 majority in the Senate right now. We need to protect and expand our majority, and that starts by flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeating Ron Johnson. That starts with you. It’s going to be a steep climb to raise as much as we can in the next week, but I believe we can do it if enough of us come together over the next few days before we close out the quarter. | | | Folks — **Here they go again. **While we're working to move Wisconsin forward for working folks, our opponent and their dark money backers on the sidelines are falling back on their old playbook: attack, attack, attack. We can't afford more lies and political games when there's so much work left to do, and that's why I wanted to ask personally: [**Can you chip in $10 right now to make sure we have the resources to fight back and defend our Wisconsin values? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31327121/292312643/-333842027?refcode=tv&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc5NDk2NC0wNWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e70ahQYSDT6rljv9ugrIFCvQdj6dFycmDuCi1sszVQo=) **As we speak, right-wing Super PAC allies are _pouring millions_ of dollars into Wisconsin to run TV attack ads against us.** Why? To spread lies, misinformation, and division because they think they can buy our district in the next election. We can't let that happen, folks. [**Can you rush $10 or any amount now to stand with me? Together, we're delivering more than ever before, and we can't allow their reckless lies, personal attacks, and political games to take us back or get in the way of the progress we're making in Wisconsin. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31327124/292312674/-333842027?refcode=tv&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc5NDk2NC0wNWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e70ahQYSDT6rljv9ugrIFCvQdj6dFycmDuCi1sszVQo=)

name: Andrew Gordon
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Back in 2006, during his first term in the State Assembly, Tom Nelson voted against the Republican marriage equality ban. It was a vote that took real courage.

Public feelings on marriage equality were the opposite of what they are today, and because of the large GOP majorities in the Legislature, passage of the constitutional amendment was never in doubt.

Because Tom represented a conservative district, party leaders told him to vote for the ban — the easy way to avoid the issue in his next campaign.

That’s not what Tom did, because that’s not who he is. Believe Tom when he says he’ll beat Ron Johnson and go to Washington to stand for justice and equality — because at one of the darkest hours for LGBTQ Wisconsinites, Tom had our back.

**Happy Pride!**

— Andrew, UW-Madison organizer for the 2006 Fair Wisconsin Campaign (opposing the constitutional marriage equality ban)

Getting closer and closer to hitting our goal
#

Just a $3 donation, friend.
That’s what I’m asking of you ahead of our federally mandated fundraising deadline next Wednesday.
$3 might not seem like much, especially compared to the millions of dollars Republicans will take from mega-donors, fossil fuel CEOs, and the gun lobby to hold onto this seat.
But when you chip in $3 — and Hubert from York County chips in $10, and Darryl from Delaware County chips in $50, and Olivia from Allegheny County chips in $5, and so on — we get closer and closer to hitting our goal.
That’s what the coalition we're building looks like.
Working people who believe our government should work for them, pitching in a few bucks at a time. And we wouldn’t have it any other way.
[So, I hope I can count on you to make that $3 donation today. Please chip in ahead of our FEC deadline if you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31329151/292320737/-347207331?refcode2=3db9f80c-0ad5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210624-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5ZjgwYy0wYWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcmumD7sON4Cej7KWPU_3zumpkRVSLoXJBiGKSjH57E=)

subject: big decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
This deadline will decide how we run this campaign.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31329297/292321276/-2023814932?refcode=20210624.2_CB_BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWNiODI1Ny0wYWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMrFABZoU31vX2xvUESuP44m3kMJY185zbyhHCIzqn4=)

| | Derek,

Our end-of-quarter fundraising goal is coming up quickly, so I’ll be blunt: it’s powerfully important that we hit our goal of 10,000 contributions.

[**When we’re up against someone with a sky’s-the-limit budget, it’s crucial we develop the best, most sophisticated strategy possible. And to do that, we need to hit this goal. Can you chip in today to help us stand up to extremism in Virginia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31329298/292321277/1097049879?refcode=20210624.2_CB_BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWNiODI1Ny0wYWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMrFABZoU31vX2xvUESuP44m3kMJY185zbyhHCIzqn4=)

We won’t have a deadline this important until the end of _September_ , Derek. Let that sink in.

These numbers are going to shape our strategy for the rest of the election. They’re going to set budgets for opening offices, hiring more organizers, running TV ads, and more.

Terry’s opponent, Trump-darling and right-wing extremist Glenn Youngkin, has an endless stream of cash. He’s willing to spend whatever it takes to buy the Virginia Governor’s office for Donald Trump -- including $75 million from his own deep pockets.

Derek, we can’t afford to let up now, especially with Youngkin’s team watching our fundraising numbers like hawks.

name: Colin McCann
subject: Derek has always fought against corruption and for the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[make a contribution before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline](https://act.myngp.com/el/KO7kRixWtdDQCvH_FhGCE_OPigbixn8kqqPZ-qjmyBE=/DF-eTsqFEGJpYw7yKAM2hp9yLVtrWYm7r3-KpGgEF2Q=?gpsid=50_115_19508&refcode=em21_210624_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210624_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**. But first, I want to tell you why it's so important.

I know I don't need to explain to you that we cannot take our democracy for granted -- this past year, we all saw that truth first hand. That's why it's so important that we re-elect leaders like Derek, who are committed stewards of our democracy.

As long as he's been in public service: Derek has always fought against corruption and for the people. Right now, he's helping to lead efforts to reform our democracy and make Congress more accountable to the people.

**He 's a true champion, and we cannot risk losing his voice in Congress next year.**

That's where you come in, Peter. In less than one week, our campaign to re-elect Derek will reach the FEC end-of-quarter deadline. That means all of our financial reports will become public. If we don't show strong fundraising numbers, you can bet Derek's Republican challengers will take notice.

**[We've set a goal to raise $5,000 before Wednesday's end-of-quarter deadline so that our FEC report shows the strength of this grassroots team. Can Derek count on you to chip in before Wednesday to help us reach this goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/KO7kRixWtdDQCvH_FhGCE_OPigbixn8kqqPZ-qjmyBE=/DF-eTsqFEGJpYw7yKAM2hp9yLVtrWYm7r3-KpGgEF2Q=?gpsid=50_115_19508&refcode=em21_210624_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210624_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Together, we can protect and expand the Democratic House majority so Derek and his colleagues can keep fighting for the people. I hope we can count on your support before Wednesday's deadline.

Thank you,

Colin

Colin McCann
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/KO7kRixWtdDQCvH_FhGCE_OPigbixn8kqqPZ-qjmyBE=/DF-eTsqFEGJpYw7yKAM2hp9yLVtrWYm7r3-KpGgEF2Q=?gpsid=50_115_19508&refcode=em21_210624_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210624_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31330781/292327348/602283465?refcode=20210624_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzEzMjZlNC0wZGQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDRK8Y0uPWH__fjpq8ajBJV3erJxR5K3FEPvvjK6KNA=) Friends, It’s Congressman Tim Ryan, and I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice! I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up—okay, for outright shouting—at my GOP colleagues on the House floor, whether it’s for their bone-headed opposition to the PRO Act or for their refusal to vote for the Jan 6th commission. Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. I’m running to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat to be a voice for hard-working Americans and make sure they get the fair shot they deserve—**but with our campaign’s FEC reporting deadline around the corner, I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.** The public fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to expand our Democratic majority and start getting big things done for the American people. I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up—okay, for outright shouting—at my GOP colleagues on the House floor, whether it’s for their bone-headed opposition to the PRO Act or for their refusal to vote for the Jan 6th commission. Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. I’m running to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat to be a voice for hard-working Americans and make sure they get the fair shot they deserve—but with our campaign’s FEC reporting deadline around the corner, I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own. The public fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to expand our Democratic majority and start getting big things done for the American people. = = = In the age of Citizens United, money talks. But together, we’re gonna show the pundits and the national Republicans watching this race that we’ve got a winning team that’s ready to see this thing through to the end. Thank you, -Tim If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden administration lawyers are fighting our lawful open records requests
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, Judicial Watch is confronting our biggest, and I believe _most important_ set of challenges in 27 years.
They include but are not limited to our important lawsuits digging into Biden family corruption and radical Biden administration efforts to gut our laws against illegal immigration. And as they say, these are very big deals...which is why I hope you will **_[make your best donation to Judicial Watch right now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56019&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MjQxMzQxNTI=)_**.
Not surprisingly, Biden administration lawyers are hard at work fighting our lawful open records requests in the courts. Plus, calls for legal and investigative assistance we are receiving from conservative groups around the country are _accelerating_.
Many concerned citizens and honest public officials are seeking our expert help to enforce the rule of law. Threats range from additional Leftist assaults on election integrity and Big Tech efforts to silence conservatives. And we continue the all-important fight for accountability in the seditious Deep State efforts to destroy the Trump presidency.
_I do not want to have to turn away even one important corruption, open government, illegal immigration or election integrity case_ as demands on us are at an all-time high. That is why **_[I hope you will make your best donation to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56019&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MjQxMzQxNTI=)_**.
With your support, we will:
* **Aggressively move forward with our Biden accountability lawsuits and investigations into Biden family corruption, plus more Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests concerning Biden administration unlawful moves to open our borders to a dangerous new wave of illegal immigration**.

* **Continue our legal challenges against illegal "sanctuary" policies that unlawfully prohibit local police from cooperating with federal immigration authorities**. The radical Biden immigration agenda makes our independent efforts in the courts to overturn illegal sanctuary policies - like our ongoing lawsuits against deadly sanctuary policies in **San Francisco** and **Santa Clara County, California** - _even more important_.

* **Add more resources to our highly successful election integrity work**. Voter fraud is aided by the failure of states to conform to the **National Voter Registration Act** requirement to clean their voter rolls. Combined with the failure of many states to require **Voter ID** at the polls and by mail makes it possible for ineligible individuals to vote. _We are currently pursuing more "clean the voter rolls" lawsuits against **Colorado** , **Illinois** , **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania**_**...** _while at the same time keeping a close eye on Soros-funded groups pushing for "all mail-in" voting and ballot harvesting that further weaken safeguards against voter fraud_.

But there is much more to do in the coming days and months. Which is why I hope you will **_[make your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56019&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MjQxMzQxNTI=)_** to help us get the job done. Judicial Watch is the one conservative institution in Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for the rule of law.
We are conservative...we are independent...we hold _both_ Democrats _and_ Republicans accountable to the rule of law...and _we are fighting for you_! Thank you for your **_[support!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56019&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MjQxMzQxNTI=)_**
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton President

subject: Raise the minimum wage!

Our Worker Protection Unit in the Attorney General’s office has found that not only is there an absurdly low minimum wage, Virginians are getting short-changed because thousands of workers are being robbed of their pay.
If you’re working extra hours and not being paid, that’s called wage theft and we are using our office to fight back and hold the perpetrators accountable.
**The fact is: everyone deserves to be paid a fair and full wage for an honest day’s work.**
**[So will you please add your name to raise the minimum wage to $15?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31332672/292333861/-592430024?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTY3MTQ4Ny0xM2Q1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lt-B_4gj3xhMQftzwB01s2-dTC2r1oNVqishff_flhI=&emci=3b2ba7f4-0dd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9e671487-13d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9499186)**

I’ll level with you here — voters go to polls soon, and we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines on this one. Please help: Thanks for your support, Rick Perry Fmr. Texas Governor Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress. PO BOX 341027 Austin, TX 78734 Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. name: Nancy Mace
subject: re: no more needless war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
we are going to have to continue to work to increase transparency, protect our troops, and prevent unnecessary war... [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=e80d439c757341aba790ce0726cc0a6c&_e=-SO7h_9nZTZRWW7kmhzKqpyWZfrrieAdmeVWyq16o5Y3yh5gVna2MtEDcy8BPP8zMvdHJyEvspnG04GA-lAGe0LGTgHpRjsmAUaYsZvVwtmBfXiqcLFU0TtFCaFW__TK3FAfWRXbHThmEW_0lkjIA7rTQD5htUsVTbZ9WOdzY_vZC0abwBZ5ibsuTUUUYA8IIIxblTPt-2vEy5BRQGuALv-NgtMl_u3VYaOZHLyJ0IQHSVHITd-WwlIE1lcz2cPH4i6ZrtDFNLaxk8Q0noPHQiqXCNGu78xKyY4TvpG9J2CfppyqdkYvX4MIg6V0zJ6hJdYt1UwRxj8JrlhKv9irTXTGAoobw6uNGfYDe4T8o0GRcySMD2j_Zspit3rw4ktvM7IxHv8PT2_yqFhH3WtSkGn6lQ0vHsdCsVAIn7NqX2vS2sy3UeP2qWtbPdsJkvbyae1dr8c-yL2ZI92hnW9K9w%3D%3D) Friend, Here's a simple truth: every single time Washington bureaucrats drag us into a war, they know they won't be the ones who will do the fighting and dying. _Our children will._ But over the past two decades, the Washington foreign policy establishment has dragged us into unchecked, unilateral, never-ending conflicts overseas without so much as individual Congressional approval for the action. Last week, Congress took the first step in putting that dangerous practice to a close by ending the AUMF. But friend, we are going to have to continue to work to increase transparency, protect our troops, and prevent unnecessary war - especially in the Biden administration! That's why I'm hoping you'll join me by signing my petition to make sure the executive branch can't make war without Congressional approval again. [**SIGN YOUR NAME NOW**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=e80d439c757341aba790ce0726cc0a6c&_e=-SO7h_9nZTZRWW7kmhzKqpyWZfrrieAdmeVWyq16o5Y3yh5gVna2MtEDcy8BPP8zMvdHJyEvspnG04GA-lAGe0LGTgHpRjsmAUaYsZvVwtmBfXiqcLFU0TtFCaFW__TK3FAfWRXbHThmEW_0lkjIA7rTQD5htUsVTbZ9WOdzY_vZC0abwBZ5ibsuTUUUYA8IIIxblTPt-2vEy5BRQGuALv-NgtMl_u3VYaOZHLyJ0IQHSVHITd-WwlIE1lcz2cPHCvkbQtq4XqOHgepsvUYhqkFzl3lZPfiVhyOG5PhAy3_4-WGIvtXbtGFjBWFc3EucfmZPH1cg7ydH0tH1J4WKYT-Y2hxWgAbQ80sHAWXrz7Hx6OnNd9cYvl4lYQhKtI-TiuH4QMJS0PjXKktJ0h-cyDh0803WqDocaH2Xs9JJa33S2G8QrssDPvRDARHboJbLXV4mGsy1A8Oju0tpfuMhtg%3D%3D) Constitutionally, Congress has final say in matters of war. It’s past time to restore Congress’s constitutional authority over war and to force the legislative body to do the job our founders expected us to do. _To me - it's unreasonable that Congress is NOT serving their proper check on the executive branch when it comes to war. _ I am standing up to demand Congress check the executive war powers and stand up for our men and women in uniform. **If you agree, please join me by signing my petition:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-160025](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=e80d439c757341aba790ce0726cc0a6c&_e=-SO7h_9nZTZRWW7kmhzKqpyWZfrrieAdmeVWyq16o5Y3yh5gVna2MtEDcy8BPP8zMvdHJyEvspnG04GA-lAGe0LGTgHpRjsmAUaYsZvVwtmBfXiqcLFU0TtFCaFW__TK3FAfWRXbHThmEW_0lkjIA7rTQD5htUsVTbZ9WOdzY_vZC0abwBZ5ibsuTUUUYA8IIIxblTPt-2vEy5BRQGuALv-NgtMl_u3VYaOZHLyJ0IQHSVHITd-WwlIE1lcz2cPHoMLnZEl0CWhGmAB1gq1ZQ6NaqAs4Nnupncm8xsMJphvkPatPoXiV_C6b_PH-RdFeJcL7gl70lI3mF_xfwEthFUxtDp0LZnncAtPeJYtxc5HCkjpPHYwwhBLTF98vHZbeE0tuyEhhXIVVTHNg-6lgkEDByUnA660iB2FUOs-gvYQ3qjA6rGh8At1jhAYqBWvpnjMw4aF5HZKr0vT3gIvslQ%3D%3D)** If Washington is going to send more and more of our children to shed their blood on foreign shores, the very least Congress can do is give their parents a say. Nancy Mace |

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mitch McConnell just killed the For the People Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | **New York Times: Republicans Use Filibuster to Block Voting Rights Bill** Hi Peter, The Senate Grim Reaper just killed the For the People Act with a filibuster. Even after Joe Manchin created a compromise that every Democrat got on board with, Mitch McConnell shut it down on a party-line vote. **The GOP has no interest in compromise \-- they want to rig the system. But we can still win this fight.** | **[DONATE TO END THE FILIBUSTER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31335389/292343543/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210624_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGE2ZTMzLTFhZDUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=86kqJ0Jheepzl76J8I32h5VdOsuFcWejcEmW8Him52A=)**
---

Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema care deeply about voting rights, and they are the only lifeline for the filibuster. **McConnell's craven obstruction might finally wake them up and end the filibuster for good.**

**[Peter, we have to step up the pressure to end the filibuster and save democracy. We're taking action, but we haven't hit our $3,000 goal. Too many Democrats have stopped donating because McConnell's obstruction has forced them to give up any hope for the future of our democracy. name: Harold Earls
subject: I’m furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
Ilhan Omar just spat on the graves of our fallen heroes... | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=1a057ec1d76444e089d37ba660350ca9&_e=WV21iT79WEOqxTWZTKoIw_ddZa-cr06rG7qDKM3-dEy6TzM2LeNSmRdafA-zjo0cNzWwOXhON0YerOOb-urlwneIfuHy9B1fVLF6KYfraO6wgN_-6aLLsb3r7nEQVncYsn1Fc2vnZjLmu9h8xZ8TBMNQm_DAUf3kLOeinLopiFo0cvrM_BclSLu5R439x9qeYzbSHoNO5rx8I1np3V71Dhm-gsQWTBU2Qv1POPnwnme5FGKxCuaLi4zpJOTNdQvN-qQYqi5Fvz2EFJNOXMHENV6nK0n5yrUzG_qDXi3qO8S1S8NTiqOrwEOvQQxK1_0dEFgG59MN85D3rrY4AdCdiv6WrOPn1_ScscuxMAzg2UbMYKPSlB6MGT2hMCa5Ck70_oXgthBVSe_cIn2hp8-ChpXUazTn2A-HL7EDI03hT-RUGJ9PHwZDfHvjgs-4ya8ntVKDH4xo3d2NHHnbB7JQ372I-g2Y5AVM6hxrsyR4a_fk2EeNHoRuRjcczplB6lxH)
|
---
Peter,

Our kids are growing up learning that it’s better to kneel during the National Anthem than to salute the flag...

But with Dems in Washington grouping America in with terrorist organizations like Hamas and the Taliban, who can blame them?

As a parent, I am angry. **_As a veteran, I am downright furious. _**

Millions of brave women and men put their lives on the line just so people like Ilhan Omar have the freedom to make offensive comparisons like that. **I’m not about to sit back and let her spit on their graves and disrespect their sacrifice. **

I’m taking a stand against America-bashing Dems and showing the next generation that we should be PROUD to live in this great nation.

Peter, I hope you will stand with me by chipping in whatever you can at this link: [_**https://secure.winred.com/earls-for-georgia/donate**_](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=1a057ec1d76444e089d37ba660350ca9&_e=WV21iT79WEOqxTWZTKoIw_ddZa-cr06rG7qDKM3-dEy6TzM2LeNSmRdafA-zjo0cNzWwOXhON0YerOOb-urlwneIfuHy9B1fVLF6KYfraO6wgN_-6aLLsb3r7nEQVncYsn1Fc2vnZjLmu9h8xZ8TBMNQm_DAUf3kLOeinLopiFo0cvrM_BclSLu5R439x9qeYzbSHoNO5rx8I1np3V71Dhm-gsQWTBU2Qv1POPnwnme5FGKxCuaLi4zpJOTNdQvN-qQYqi5Fvz2EFJNOXMHENV6nK0n5yrUzG_qDXi3qO8R3HjmcP19G6FyomYeXabIJZ2lt0jpziQK_rQbimWIfO3hpI-kHSvAr8hiM_e1euIVAWVxcBpAsGjnLVs6zBLHVX4rupQWbGRQa-4cwsGZNasFxyxPHmuuKO8cA0IGLZ9QIMS7eXUhGJR4z-PQKMmNf5-WJS9pcBxY-gY4zG797AdDH-RXE7FsBLYKcmRwyQvX7JYrsP9SuaSd0bRpnad9O)

clean_body: Ilhan Omar just spat on the graves of our fallen heroes... | | | Peter, Our kids are growing up learning that it’s better to kneel during the National Anthem than to salute the flag... But with Dems in Washington grouping America in with terrorist organizations like Hamas and the Taliban, who can blame them? As a parent, I am angry. As a veteran, I am downright furious. Millions of brave women and men put their lives on the line just so people like Ilhan Omar have the freedom to make offensive comparisons like that. I’m not about to sit back and let her spit on their graves and disrespect their sacrifice. I’m taking a stand against America-bashing Dems and showing the next generation that we should be PROUD to live in this great nation. Peter, I hope you will stand with me by chipping in whatever you can at this link: In freedom, Harold | | | Paid for by Earls for Georgia | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Representation matters!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Can you help get another proud LGBTQ+ candidate into Congress?

Hi Peter,
It’s Pride month and I want to take this opportunity to talk just a little bit about representation. In short: it matters. A lot! Our communities are diverse, and our representatives should be, too. Around 5% of the population identifies as LGBTQ+, but only .1% (yes, that’s POINT ONE percent) of our elected officials do. Right now, 11 people total in both the House and the Senate identify as LGBTQ+, which is only .02%!
[**Can you pitch in $27 today to help raise that number by a fraction and send me, a proud openly gay man, to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31336872/292348987/-1874959920?refcode=6-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmFlNGI2OC0xZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuD1lUYzEInbAMzIpF999Ejfvw7KN-aotBXVBn-dVgA=)
The thing is, queer issues aren’t only identity-based. Yes, we absolutely still see specific identity-based discrimination, which is why we need to pass the Equality Act as soon as possible.
**But queer folks also experience disproportionate harm at the intersections of their identities. For example, LGBTQ+ people have a national poverty rate of over 20%, compared to cis-het folks, who have a poverty rate that hovers closer to 15%. And it compounds further when you add additional marginalizations: black trans folx have nearly a 50% chance of being imprisoned at some point, compared to white trans folx (12%) or the population as a whole (3%). **
**When it comes down to it, all issues are LGBTQ+ issues.**
And representation alone isn’t enough, but it does make a huge difference to get a diversity of voices at the table and bring their lived experience to the process. It also provides role models for younger folks who don’t often see themselves represented in positions of power.
**So let’s get some more LGBTQ+ folks in power! And while we’re at it, let’s get a better balance of gender representation, of racial background, and even a better balance of occupational history—how can we represent bartenders and nurses and teachers if we don’t have some in the mix to share their perspectives? **
**[Will you make a donation of $27 today in honor of PRIDE Month to send one more LGBTQ+ voice to Congress and help fight for a better world? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31336889/292348998/-1874959920?refcode=6-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmFlNGI2OC0xZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuD1lUYzEInbAMzIpF999Ejfvw7KN-aotBXVBn-dVgA=)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for Congress, CA-08
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31336913/292349018/-1874959920?refcode=6-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmFlNGI2OC0xZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuD1lUYzEInbAMzIpF999Ejfvw7KN-aotBXVBn-dVgA=)

name: Team Schmidt
subject: FW: SAVE OUR SCHOOLS!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Derek's last email to you. He recently signed a pledge to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS from damaging ideas like critical race the Friend, We wanted to make sure you saw Derek's last email to you. He recently signed a pledge to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS from damaging ideas like critical race theory, which seek to teach future generations of Kansans to be ashamed of the country they should love. Fellow American - - I'm proud to be living and running for Congress in the great state of Florida. Here in the sunshine state, we don’t just run our mouths with ideas, we take REAL ACTION to protect America from the absolute failure of the Biden Administration. **We take action to defend and secure our southern border.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8d2636dce4c44b878846d60ca3a58c9c&_e=BwLpTEJHBg6Mv_Ad6M0hypXFF-ggN8IPhJ-_CYYBfl5mgg00sM7mIjY_dT4OElMAzuJUdEgi_0ILHFG1idue2EVED81uOjgQkYw988QP8CeOy0hkrrlFM__ucydAedBRdjRzSPNbfY6l4cz3_bJxgpxFCbVPcCT2YQjIIRHsP-weIu4_9UBU2Lbk-qdjCdGq7TeUPy72IMusJSfiXOwyTPZKoDxPLhQ7_7zvEHHjqeUSagcGvA45J8r7-5rl_8H8o4BTd-fwprAqu4PQUWtfmsiC2HfJ3rjzI8l_CslNDt3gKccpwMz50rcZyLJrpsb3rPrHVfRr6nr6Ak118NAPDNyNQ0IK83D4-EwBnxl_ZWGIq0w8WSq2JFdIsIOcYpVNXfU4xyqKhNjgzhlnPIjobrrIOPAVi-iuMBgOAQWVK65tvvgSdRWLseIfalJfnajgLX33MBRNZhd_1XJnX63ogw%3D%3D)

But we all know, we had strong immigration policies and our borders were protected when Donald Trump was in office. Meanwhile, the Democrats Border Czar hasn’t even made an appearance at our southern border.

**_Now, it’s up to Republicans to pick up where Trump left off and FINISH THE WALL._**

We are all paying the price for Biden’s weak policies. I’m working my tail off to get to Congress and fight for conservatives across the country - because we clearly need strong leaders. clean_body: Here in the sunshine state, we don’t just run our mouths with ideas, we take ACTION to protect America from the failure of the Biden Administration. . | Fellow American - - I'm proud to be living and running for Congress in the great state of Florida. Here in the sunshine state, we don’t just run our mouths with ideas, we take REAL ACTION to protect America from the absolute failure of the Biden Administration. We take action to defend and secure our southern border. The Democrat currently representing this district won’t admit that Biden created this national security crisis. But we all know, we had strong immigration policies and our borders were protected when Donald Trump was in office. Meanwhile, the Democrats Border Czar hasn’t even made an appearance at our southern border. Now, it’s up to Republicans to pick up where Trump left off and FINISH THE WALL. We are all paying the price for Biden’s weak policies. I’m working my tail off to get to Congress and fight for conservatives across the country - because we clearly need strong leaders. But I need your support to WIN. | | | ---|---|--- | | Fellow American, I’m making it my mission to fight for issues that affect YOU and have an impact on this great nation - and it’s clear we need people in DC that actually care about our country’s security. Your support will help send a Hispanic fighter to Congress to secure our border and protect all American citizens. For safety and security, Jose Castillo Republican for Congress | | PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS Jose Castillo for Congress PO Box 2651 Davenport, FL 33836 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Schuyler VanValkenburg

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31337827/292352139/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjAyNTUzMS0yMWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jyopEwpc52LgAxypjM--12zAy0EAnJIU9HoP-y1va64=&emci=63dd2920-5bd4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a2025531-21d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek --

For those of you who don’t know me, my name is Schuyler VanValkenburg. I have had the honor of representing the 72nd House District -- the Richmond suburbs of Henrico County -- since I flipped this seat from red to blue in 2017.

Henrico County has been my home for over 20 years now. It’s where I have taught government and history to hundreds of middle school and high school students in Henrico County Public Schools. It’s where I have raised my three kids. And it’s the community I am proud to fight for every day as a member of the House of Delegates.

Right now, I am the only active K-12 public school teacher serving in the General Assembly. I have made it my mission to make sure our state legislature is investing in our schools, our students, and our educators. With our Democratic majority, we’ve been able to make historic investments in education, but there’s still so much work to be done.

**This week the Republican State Leadership Committee unveiled a list of their top 13 target house districts in Virginia. And I am on that list. This means the Virginia GOP is going to be flooding my opponent’s campaign with cash. clean_body: | | | Derek -- For those of you who don’t know me, my name is Schuyler VanValkenburg. I have had the honor of representing the 72nd House District -- the Richmond suburbs of Henrico County -- since I flipped this seat from red to blue in 2017. Henrico County has been my home for over 20 years now. It’s where I have taught government and history to hundreds of middle school and high school students in Henrico County Public Schools. It’s where I have raised my three kids. And it’s the community I am proud to fight for every day as a member of the House of Delegates. Right now, I am the only active K-12 public school teacher serving in the General Assembly. I have made it my mission to make sure our state legislature is investing in our schools, our students, and our educators. With our Democratic majority, we’ve been able to make historic investments in education, but there’s still so much work to be done. This week the Republican State Leadership Committee unveiled a list of their top 13 target house districts in Virginia. And I am on that list. This means the Virginia GOP is going to be flooding my opponent’s campaign with cash. name: Action Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Tell Jared & Ivanka: “You’re still horrible, and we won’t forget what you did to America”
body:
They are pushing stories in the media that they are “distancing” themselves from Trump, and they are really reasonable, and they are really peachy keen good folks.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [TELL JARED & IVANKA: "YOU'RE STILL HORRIBLE AND YOU WON'T MAKE US FORGET WHAT YOU DID TO AMERICA"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4bade865-9867-43ef-91f3-762314f4f558/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta200ac4a-7c4a-4a56-87e2-3f05e663967e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Hi Friend, After 4 years of aiding and abetting Donald Trump’s incompetence, attacks on our democracy, and the profound damage he did to our nation, Jared and Ivanka are trying to make us forget they are horrible people. They are **[pushing stories](https://default.salsalabs.org/T929a9127-db94-4fcc-bb1d-1b32ee7fb963/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **in the media that they are “distancing” themselves from Trump, and they are really reasonable, and they are really peachy keen good folks. **[Nope. We’re not buying it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78b7d483-50bb-4f29-828c-9ee0037656bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). ** The time for them to stand up and do the right thing years ago, and we won’t let them whitewash their reputations so they can go back to cocktail parties again and pretend the past never happened. [**Tell Jared and Ivanka: “We won’t forget what you did to America”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68b2f918-3ffe-4ac8-a203-0971657b104b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Call your Senator and tell them to confirm David Chipman as ATF Director >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
Our nation is facing an epidemic of gun violence. The good thing is that President Biden is keeping his promise to make tackling gun violence a top priority of his administration.
That’s why he nominated David Chipman, a former Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) agent (and former Senior Advisor to Giffords!) to lead the ATF.
As a former ATF special agent, David Chipman will be able to address the most pressing issues facing the bureau from day one, including reducing gun violence.
Today, David moved past the US Senate Judiciary Committee, an important hurdle in his confirmation process. Now he heads to the Senate floor, where we expect the vote to be close.
**_Help us secure David Chipman’s nomination as the next ATF Director by texting CHIPMAN to “34131" or by calling 202-335-5608 and urging your senator to vote YES on his nomination._**
David has spent his career serving the public, combating violent crime, and striving to make our nation and our communities safer. As a responsible gun owner, decorated law enforcement professional, and gun safety expert, David is the perfect choice for ATF director.
This job is so important. ATF plays a critical role in regulating the gun industry, enforcing firearm laws, and investigating terrorism. But the agency has not had a confirmed director since 2015!
_That’s why we need David Chipman at the helm._
**_So take a moment to text CHIPMAN to “34131" or call 202-335-5608 and urge your senator to vote YES on David Chipman’s nomination._**
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=262%2E3935704%2EXI-Bl-) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Don't want to receive our emails? ---

Peter,

Gas is up. Wheat is up. The price of corn, coal and lumber are also up.

**China** is cracking down on freedom of expression & liberty in Hong Kong. The United States is back in the World Health Organization – **the UN** continues to help cover up the origins of the COVID-19 virus. Violence in the Middle East is on the rise.

And Nancy Pelosi wants to spend her time issuing fines to Republicans who don’t wear face masks on the House floor, rather than create a commission to discover whether or not COVID-19 was a man-made virus which escaped from a Chinese lab.

I remember 1979 and I don’t want to relive it. _**Do you?**_

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=671aa64cb7254575b6e293ef97de1909&_e=4NipJvvvaFZ3v9D2zrQBJWvoky1Di000KghZmNFInf55vPV2aEymXE2YlqC3BXOeMW4x-_R5ZotJBqHbw04ZG9tBUV6nsTBexaCXQ0OI5-VAc1i5dUQpY0Inf4ItMH_19Q1cWMXnrqRsHsLcqj3kI6AFKTU2M-znsHPw9wZrAwS-_GfaERmpBiB-bZSuKoidhuqn6EN8EVNte7UyqizFhtY30qgDhA3kwFSJ0Mf2klLJIbdluIRYF4WQ2KKq9JNexD-SBcq4cAqj5syfmLxVdn66tkUW4-egzY7XyfCRqnGpcOZPz_zA5fzLFLBUWM4Wu5dUqzDbDTOktk_B2ICLRyK9c4DVNMpRVYWLUdCKBtqi5y88GgYx7-lRYkZnGurp-yn51JTbTfO3lhvDJFBKrlxgelWLZ_ORHoGY1BTGKxfVkXPEZFNmhYMy6-xDXw-HefsRYm2R6Ndubctk_yJCy8pWTmzuYt-bIT1Lpx7pjFvEqCUT0qKgYDzicd5I2y2LgwwZUYCHovY8tqTYzDzR0Q%3D%3D)

Since Democrats took total control of Washington in January:
1. **Biden and Pelosi have spent $6 trillion**
2. Proposed another $6 trillion in spending
3. Proposed higher taxes
4. **Rising gas prices**
5\. Illegal immigrants get a free trip to the U.S. courtesy of American taxpayers!

clean_body: Would you do me a personal favor and sign my petition before midnight? Republicans only need to pick up a handful of seats to win back control of the House, and we need your help to do it. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, Gas is up. Wheat is up. The price of corn, coal and lumber are also up. China is cracking down on freedom of expression & liberty in Hong Kong. The United States is back in the World Health Organization – the UN continues to help cover up the origins of the COVID-19 virus. Violence in the Middle East is on the rise. And Nancy Pelosi wants to spend her time issuing fines to Republicans who don’t wear face masks on the House floor, rather than create a commission to discover whether or not COVID-19 was a man-made virus which escaped from a Chinese lab. I remember 1979 and I don’t want to relive it. Do you? Since Democrats took total control of Washington in January: 1. Biden and Pelosi have spent $6 trillion 2. Proposed another $6 trillion in spending 3. Proposed higher taxes 4. Rising gas prices 5\. Illegal immigrants get a free trip to the U.S. courtesy of American taxpayers! letting us know you’re as committed as we are to winning back the House for Republicans in next year’s elections. name: Team Padilla
subject: Here’s the deal…
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friend —

As you may know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in
California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and
anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.

They pose a real threat to the progress we’re making here in California
and across the country. They’d love to defeat us and end our ability to
fight for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or election security.

So we need your help today.
Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the recall
are going to set their sights on our campaign as well.

So we need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to
hitting our goal.

Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider
contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can
keep Alex in the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210624-1-15&recurring=true&t=1001&refcode2=108_159979_YUURUZ&akid=108%2E159979%2EYUURUZ ]So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards
our critical June FEC fundraising deadline? We need your help to hit our
2,500 contribution goal so we can generate the resources to hold this
seat.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210624-1-15&t=1002&refcode2=108_159979_YUURUZ&akid=108%2E159979%2EYUURUZ ]DONATE NOW

It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for
everything you do — it means so much to Alex to be alongside you in this
fight.

Team Padilla

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=108%2E159979%2EYUURUZ

body:
Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVqaPJoVRPfgoZYmsF5ERcYmIqeQnac7PR4mJL6x2LP1F8NLucmDTUujjATGdA8srrZ6Tl9gkHgEphmsx6nZahjvDGJgFByERPUFF2luVV_yup8FHhYXSegb9c8ji2HumnYGP5n-m9N4Is0ImuDT8j6zlEmGRubmCGLZMALcJ4tLb4SsGcyT6zCPbItx8dr-XjBTG0w0MZ8BKXDYGU8EXb5I%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVmoX49Z7frY6u5Jw2tD5AzHp4sExtdB_1WXVAA5Ing2hQO7MlQHRnDHArBD-Tx7O3azj53bYcqXoEwqM3aY-FNAQLl1xL7efuqVa1cEwHkr1D5R47ssC3x6nM_a8NLpu8HKj3IUUrx6ccz9KZDpPHgh-HZQoWQyQgH8sLCSXH_INaH4F8OmeC-gUbhGlzypIDUj4ZO3DSfZ986Fvn_miAl8%3D)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVrj9uAw3NWudQL9VF_Glq0VZj-fWcnAM56SA7XrrfjhtG2kaDOwzZXpEPcS0YF3SR1oyhLJHrB7E4Vyh0GmjVLghELt1jzjUvQAHruJr2HhoGjCTdK-nf2J543BpmJ-F144vZDNSsANJvpDkOOHe8IJDOdVJKapC6-62r6P3VHuIVnRHHgJMRK0r1c7hqq--EJ-ffbBgnZLhXIrm2PU2JxA%3D)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVrE17fYRTbw7dnqr_j1DKJRmUO60074RA5dzDYYEM29fmyF1I5hO3v7Gx6pVKlwbRWMAHdqua_a1f0ZKnp3xBprfAH0Fzsdx4hTs5SCVDvg8AQ6jOLntzwXLHRG2qjpz37S9h5pEgTjmZx7a5uN3BzOwJffhpmdiw5rjt8lXu4TIJL3GnnqGvo9KfJHOJZQW6oNGsTeaDxJmhkpa_O-_ugA%3D)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won’t be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVjd62D-ZplecXrUMtnFxjR9NfifWAfpJK3jnCaRKt4NXDmDRHvkwyjlkL9ZXWniiyCRGvk5sazCN7ntdoRZ5bz-5AcXvPJe_sNfmpEfV0SpGmPDupUORbqP4PWkuk6Jli8lrtCjIOmkv-2zEw3i6Q7Srh2l1_Ime7BO1bSnOdj-kB6rFto_0lyZD1Eci1KPSO3UFT3Z6k7Jell-0u1VpQoY%3D)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVownAhO564PPmongNG8aIOQCihKfyfVAL8ILrjZa4-UjdvUM-vthjLCyNJx3yR1rUdYq0oCvVp4S7yIg2fkUMjWeaWe7aTm-3lwYAlGIUyyBhM7D7S8ob_tKtaJk7ije2_NxZZpsm6YRbNa8OLrmqF_00qTruLxhp1jhAwsA2HSBchH4edXRHf1om9MG6KnwaP1qmfXQNKT4yXztF2y3-y0%3D)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVk-66aMJfceLUrz2U4qEnKIDfC4RxHL0mcpopVifGdda5TA5qr1Tu5K0o0vrSMugqoUG0L5eGXRe86hHfTLVB8xIYTloDQmWndDKSGsh0B-m-9n4JciGVsmSVzbONZc-pfqYe5uoil0pC7GzsT0YNWMFBnKQUOCHaP4rB1LsQcFt2T7psN63rkNz17BEz03jedvw9tyI291pf61TD4dDbWc%3D)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I’m asking you to give generously](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVhV5yFA5bsgCQ_gU2ggIUdRQYvjryo3t6JvOSN-A6nmHtNX8V2HfAtsOyOYvq041WVGUHnoJmAucxIxsRR_urbMZL3PBrpKnSKhSbZELqo8OFicC8AxQa5C2sSMF6uTxcVBDgML4XgIROMQfzRaX2C6B6GFdXi--C4Xn7CfMfFTn04VTYyW5rwGRGKeYxFf88VxlZ3qbOcaQ5IQ4C7eTHhc%3D)** – whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she’ll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RVmZviXOKRscEaQUT26UL3-GDuk1HQKKvHGHVrsQaNN4FTLxz0SY6fWYdghmsN3XkqeTG7CiJVYE_3FaPNloAgXuJ5THk1Aw9pFfdW4pXeWHhKrYLr69c8VAxU1jou_jEwEnpDF3zlDCcwQ0o04GQOqVGY9cHQvye-picyanIFWXirrssXlXRBiLIMRV9dHyBdatP_KFO2B8mbsXPpxJA2iI%3D)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b63b0e14d0dd490e9deac42053d4530b&_e=Pw-fJYtoxXfFYNrgjTZmI6tZVY57L18ITuVK4jwgQ8-ctXQyegjRNvxS6JODhhS-9qRP5WemlCN4J-gggAauntRXqEfjM8THPobh5GbJ8rrOP2N9sE8NbX33tGCrB7bV2xPRl2KRzbE6a-wQ4L0p64-Fbn_kI9K88tZK9LzjQv9m7ThFW3_VzcxXM06Z-DLoktRu9Rm1yam3yCn6Ot7HhebH8gi702f_FcmQjdmY9yl5b_KyjVLeP_wAU7FO3S9WWrNvWcv7hJjDDlz0IF9RViXm2rQMhzIYqUASCOdna78pEdfOGyCHZQLXrUBAvZpFtTvzMxK22fsEsZ283JYp9AixBBtVHiPmWP3vb4cWIw-mri_O73aRERStP7HxBA_1ywfn2axelZM6QKiTWjOc-DVJmEYFnSO35YXQkC2iM8OnWSe_Z4XyI9xBKJbeY1RppgWTfi4WoOeX-2uARq6y1rp1GOLbe1NvOtyjutdfPOk%3D)

Don’t let the Democrats defeat him

| These days, too many American voices fall on deaf ears in Washington. But Chuck Grassley always works tirelessly to keep in touch with Iowans and make sure the people have a voice in the Senate.

Chuck is a leader, a mentor, and an inspiration to conservatives across the country, and his voice is invaluable as we fight back against the disastrous policies of the Biden administration.

**Simply put, we NEED Chuck Grassley in the Senate.
**
| [**$15 TO SUPPORT SENATOR GRASSLEY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4528%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CPSXp6jmSPTKMmqNwe14Ow&sysid=1)
---
[**$35 TO SUPPORT SENATOR GRASSLEY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4529%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2bA1bXJyX8JqRs7F2518GQ&sysid=1)
---
[**$50 TO SUPPORT SENATOR GRASSLEY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4520%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=erQBm3LiTpHcWkRQaZjDWg&sysid=1)
---
[**ANYTHING TO SUPPORT SENATOR GRASSLEY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4dbzDPdDHz2t6F%2ftfpkKxg&sysid=1)
---

**The simple truth is, we need Chuck Grassley in the Senate. He’s always had our backs, now it’s time for us to have his.**

Chuck Schumer and the Democrats know how important he is to our conservative movement, and that’s why they’re planning to do whatever it takes to defeat him. We need to stand strong with Chuck and make sure he has what he needs to fight back against their attacks.

**[ Chip in today to support Chuck Grassley and help keep a conservative legend in the Senate.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4522%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d9FE24WhPQvvOKvNWF3Cig&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

Senator Tim Scott

Fellow American - nowhere is safe from the threats of the Liberal Democrats...

_Not even North Carolina._

Biden is headed to North Carolina this week. What’s the purpose of his trip? **To highlight the mess he’s made with his failed policies** - putting people out of work and driving up inflation. We don’t want Biden to visit North Carolina, we want him to implement policies that are going to help our people.

**Liberals are after the South, and they are trying to make North Carolina, the next Georgia.**

So, Fellow American, let’s give President Biden a warm North Carolina welcome and show him some southern hospitality. [**Would you be willing to sign his welcome card, and let President Biden know what you think of his visit to North Carolina? We’ll make sure he gets it before his arrival.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fea537292b3d4e7aa51f58e287d69da5&_e=CtFWPGL0lZeYO8whFTuYHJzSPwKh4G_qHRyKbyVFO1bPRVExkGso3T6q1kPYUroyKfCiWr9HtCPORXNoHsIhkpT93nerkExBNwEV5nmvc4ULQVLXSVAxvkuJBt8S2PHVwVjY0iGyZMbCNbap4ls-z_sv2V2TIz1ivHdhBjZkX1cqx9KRAxdaKx7JFK_WSpMnt3BwKlnYJggbNekJH_bJ_CCavOxXP920YbdeK2yOfa5F-QeqvLv7tlA9AuvDnhP2zs39aQAeFjcoS4MWp3kyricYxEK2rCic_-8Uvt3qwptZM70flreAmr4J0hF7ulwIpzsKPo3KazymiJhRCoiPEfPjk83bjHKDgMWh4KYSOOB6rizBBExp2CB_yRhvUV0j8FM57Bzg0I1FmG9awlW49Xv9GTsUV6r3XbsoAmeAl6D3KI-iKyJLnI7BgzwMrM954GRbaOPPXJqVI7ShPZIkA6wZUQiwQ7SoiSKpdsKPwGAIvZhRvS1e1WZSwqDJ-EDjp08d5mZpqoSKuxUzVPJSWWH2KZVV3y8m1dMnhBsUGq-48QeJjx6elLoSqsvZzF05)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fea537292b3d4e7aa51f58e287d69da5&_e=CtFWPGL0lZeYO8whFTuYHJzSPwKh4G_qHRyKbyVFO1bPRVExkGso3T6q1kPYUroyKfCiWr9HtCPORXNoHsIhkpT93nerkExBNwEV5nmvc4ULQVLXSVAxvkuJBt8S2PHVwVjY0iGyZMbCNbap4ls-z_sv2V2TIz1ivHdhBjZkX1cqx9KRAxdaKx7JFK_WSpMnt3BwKlnYJggbNekJH_bJ_CCavOxXP920YbdeK2yOfa5F-QeqvLv7tlA9AuvDnhP2zs39aQAeFjcoS4MWp3kyricYxEK2rCic_-8Uvt3qwptZM70flreAmr4J0hF7ulwIpzsKPo3KazymiJhRCoiPEfPjk83bjHKDgMWh4KYSOOB52tNjhSWLfJMS4zZU5rDbOrYaldB9I5VC2mH2wdUAkpGWN8EMJ9LrI59NsBCDQBGfixBQzvFZGTIpzVbV-8EcTlsi8bNv_RZjeSf2wInJb9tD08NzyVaHTHKPAZqL5iwP1lxReBgcQoUydEwtmgeM_lgXwrQvJVxHjMyHgyKaeQ_uqjbcWqZjgG6th5pRBvB55qUu-A-w6crBlJ-T7Z3B)

Democrats are using the momentum they’ve had flipping southern states blue. They must be stopped. They have failed their own states and are now coming to infiltrate ours.

Democratic leadership has done _nothing_ for the people in North Carolina OR the south. _We must ensure that the Left stays out of the south._

To highlight the mess he’s made with his failed policies - putting people out of work and driving up inflation. | Fellow American - nowhere is safe from the threats of the Liberal Democrats... Not even North Carolina. Biden is headed to North Carolina this week. What’s the purpose of his trip? To highlight the mess he’s made with his failed policies - putting people out of work and driving up inflation. We don’t want Biden to visit North Carolina, we want him to implement policies that are going to help our people. Liberals are after the South, and they are trying to make North Carolina, the next Georgia. So, Fellow American, let’s give President Biden a warm North Carolina welcome and show him some southern hospitality. Democrats are using the momentum they’ve had flipping southern states blue. They must be stopped. They have failed their own states and are now coming to infiltrate ours. Democratic leadership has done nothing for the people in North Carolina OR the south. We must ensure that the Left stays out of the south. So Fellow American, join me in letting President Biden know just what you think of his failed policies, Thank you, Greg Murphy, MD | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. Hello, In a few moments, [**I’m going to make an important ask ahead of our campaign’s end-of-quarter deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31342523/292370118/1491289447?refcode=MTH_em_20210624_X_FR_EOQ_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOQ_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFlN2E4MS0zMGQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Vk12m5QNXrQKMstX-2e8u6e_lxIC_xX1Ik2N1Nrdts=) But first, let me explain why your donation is so important right now. This year we _finally_ took back the House, the Senate, _and_ the White House. And we’ve acted swiftly to deliver pandemic relief and help millions of folks get vaccinated. Meanwhile Republicans are abusing the filibuster and exploiting our narrow majority to stop us from voting on more important bills that people and our planet are counting on. The other day it was on voting rights and democracy reform. Tomorrow it could be on climate action. This should raise every alarm. Our democracy and protecting the right to vote is foundational to our identity as Americans. And if we don’t take on climate change with real urgency, right now, we will have failed the next generation and every generation after in the biggest way possible. We’re seeing the devastating impacts of climate change here in New Mexico. The historic drought and heatwave we are experiencing is our new normal — a reality we simply cannot accept. Now is the time to address climate change in immediate, actionable ways. Now is NOT the time for more obstruction. We need to establish a clean energy standard to move toward 100% carbon pollution-free power, create good-paying jobs electrifying America, and take action to conserve our planet for future generations. I will keep fighting to abolish the filibuster, take bold climate action, and support New Mexico and our country. But I’m counting on your help to do everything we can to protect our wins, strengthen our majorities in both houses of Congress, and deliver on our promises to act on climate. We can’t afford to miss this opportunity to make a difference. Too much is at stake, folks. **So here’s that ask I promised: Will you chip in whatever you can ahead of our deadline? Your support will help us abolish the filibuster, act on climate, and protect our Democratic majorities in Washington.
