name: Clay Percle
subject: I was watching the tail gun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay for Virginia Contributions to Clay for Virginia are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes
body:
As I raced through the skies over northern Alaska, two massive planes came into view.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Clay for Virginia
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg) As I raced through the skies over northern Alaska, two massive planes came into view.

They were Tupolev Tu-95H bombers, known as "the Bear," and were Russia's answer to our B-52 bomber.

Before I go any further, my name is Clay Percle and **I 'm a former F-22 Raptor pilot and Squadron Commander running for Congress, and I hope you'll see I'm the right person for the job after reading this letter**.

[**Help me return checks and balances to Washington by donating here.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)

Back to my story . . .

Fifty-two minutes before I intercepted those Russian bombers, the alert siren blared loudly in the ready room.

My Wingman and I slid down the fire pole and ran to the hangar where our fully armed F-22s awaited.

When we arrived, our ground crews were ready to launch, and within six minutes of the alarm we were airborne in full afterburner.

We screamed through the air in our F-22 Raptors, the deadliest combat plane the world has ever seen.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)
I was comfortable in the machine and had been the first active duty pilot to log 1,000 hours in the Raptor - so when the imposing Russian planes came into view, flying the jet was instinctive.

**The decisions I would make over those few minutes in the air had to be PERFECT.**

My eyes shifted rapidly between the massive tail guns of the Bears and their bomb bay doors.

If the Russians moved the guns from their stowed positions, I knew we were in for a fight.

But if those bomb bay doors cracked even a hair, America was at risk. **My nation was at risk.**
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)
Flying my F-22 was like breathing as my full attention was on coordinating with the airborne command and control, making a thousand decisions that weighed American vigilance with international diplomacy.

The wrong move could trigger WWIII and I was at the tip of the spear to execute any decision.

The job of a fighter pilot isn't just to fly and fight. As I mentioned, that must be second nature.

Our job is to maintain calm and professionalism while being prepared to fight in a split second.

Our job is to play out countless scenarios and outcomes in our minds so we're steps ahead of any moves made by the enemy.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)
In Washington today, Congress is filled with lawmakers who don't think through the unintended consequences of their actions; they are shortsighted and reckless.

They're unprepared, unknowledgeable, and are putting their party ahead of their constituents.

I'll give you some examples . . .

When Congress passed the first Coronavirus Relief Package, they didn't take into account how excessive unemployment benefits would lead to a shortage of workers for businesses.

When they offered billions in PPP loans, they didn't require companies to show they actually NEEDED the cash.

They looked at pre-COVID family tax filings to determine who got money, rather than determining who was actually suffering during COVID.

And Congress kept doing this again and again, reacting with panic legislation that harmed our economy, and we'll be feeling the effects of that spending for generations.

They shot from the hip and didn't even bother to ask questions later.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)
When hackers hit the Colonial Pipeline a month ago, what did Congress do? They fired wildly, introducing eight bills that were on topic, but lacking in any real solution.

In combat, we call that "firing for effect."

It's not good enough and America deserves better from the men and women we pay to legislate in Congress.

WWIII did not start the day I intercepted Russian bombers because my judgement and calm allowed me to make the right decisions. You and your family deserve better and I vow to apply all the discipline and skill I needed in flying America's most sophisticated warplane to the decisions I will make for you in Congress.

[**Help me bring calm professionalism and preparedness to Congress by donating today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HZQv3y1wSh23CHFAEv9L1w/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)

For America,

Clay Percle
Lt Col (Ret) USAF
Candidate for Congress
Virginia's 10th Congressional District

Paid for by Clay for Virginia Contributions to Clay for Virginia are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Clay Percle is a retired member of the United States Air Force. The use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/PJCPyvGnFSnUCMjfEuYTHg)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: your first donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hear us out for a sec?
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210624-1830-header&t=1&akid=1830%2E434096%2Eh0t6bI)
Peter,
In just a sec, we're going to respectfully ask you to ** _[chip in your first-ever $5 to support John Fetterman in this race to flip Pennsylvania blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21121?refcode=em20210624-1830&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1830%2E434096%2Eh0t6bI)_** Before we get to that, we think we owe you a quick explanation. Hear us out?
Running a statewide campaign is incredibly expensive. **There are *tons* of important campaign priorities that all require a lot of resources — priorities like the following:**
* Launching our statewide organizing program
* Hiring on-the-ground organizing staffers to engage with volunteers
* Running digital ads on platforms like Facebook and Instagram
* Planning virtual and in-person events where John can meet voters
* And _a loooooot_ more... we'll spare you the entire list

**_[So, if your budget allows, will you make your first $5 donation to John Fetterman's campaign for U.S. Senate? Anything will help in this important moment for our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21121?refcode=em20210624-1830&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1830%2E434096%2Eh0t6bI)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21121?refcode=em20210624-1830&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1830%2E434096%2Eh0t6bI)**
John pledged on day one of this race not to accept a cent from corporate PACs — so we're not kidding when we say that grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign.
We realize that most folks can't afford to contribute every time we ask, but it'd mean a whole lot to John, to Gisele, and our entire campaign if you'd consider contributing today. It's going to take *a looooot* of people chipping in to go the distance in this race, so we hope you'll add your first donation today:
**_[Peter, will you donate $5 to John's campaign today before next week's Q2 deadline? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations, so we hope you'll chip in if you can swing it.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21121?refcode=em20210624-1830&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1830%2E434096%2Eh0t6bI)_**
Thank you again, 🙏 __
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210624-1830-footer&t=24&refcode2=1830_434096_h0t6bI&akid=1830%2E434096%2Eh0t6bI)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Here’s your invite.

Comprehensive LGBTQ+ anti-discrimination legislation is long overdue, and during this Pride Month, we’re renewing our fight to pass this important piece of legislation.

clean_body: Comprehensive LGBTQ+ anti-discrimination legislation is long overdue, and during this Pride Month, we’re renewing our fight to pass this important piece of legislation. | Peter, Passed by the U.S. House in February, the Equality Act prohibits discrimination based on sex, sexual orientation and gender identity in public accommodations and facilities, education, federal funding, employment, housing, credit and the jury system. Comprehensive LGBTQ+ anti-discrimination legislation is long overdue, and during this Pride Month, we’re renewing our fight to pass this important piece of legislation. Just this year alone, Republican legislators across the country have proposed and passed legislation that discriminates against transgender youth. The Equality Act would protect our kids from dangerous and harmful laws like these -- and we need it now more than ever. Thank you, Alex | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. I served our great nation in Afghanistan. Children asked for the American flag patches on our uniforms because they looked up to the freedom we were fighting for. **To the world, this flag is a symbol of hope.**

Hong Kong pro-democracy protesters proudly waved American flags and blasted OUR National Anthem. Our flag unites freedom fighters from across the world, but woke Americans refuse to see it for its beauty and glory - they want to use it to divide us.

subject: See you on Saturday for the 2021 Women's Summit!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=bc6efe1da4&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Hey Derek- This year we are partnering with NETWORK NOVA for their [Women's Summer of Summits](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b086b9c217&e=76fc145c69) as an official sponsor and we want to see YOU there.
---
| [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ba0f8f5fe2&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| These summits will be both Virtual and In-Person and will take course of the new few months. We already kicked off this past Tuesday virtually and if you missed that event, [you can check it out here. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4fb6bb366c&e=76fc145c69) [Join us and invite your friends](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=d835a411e3&e=76fc145c69)!
---
| The 5th annual Women's Summit Events will be in 3 different locations this year: Northern Virginia, Harrisonburg, and Virginia Beach which is all included in your ticket!

_**[We want to see you THIS WEEKEND in Northern Virginia:](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=bd1ea80c54&e=76fc145c69)**_

\- June 25 (Fri) 7:00 – 8:30pm - GRASSROOTS MIX & MINGLE (Rowan Tree – 280 Sunset Park Dr, Herndon, VA). An evening social at Rowan Tree with musical guest Jillian Matundan followed by Julie Jakopic (Virginia’s List) who will talk about the historic number of women running for office this year in Virginia. Come join the conversation (280 Sunset Park Dr, Herndon, VA).

\- June 26 (Sat) 4:00 – 9:30pm - SUMMER OF SUMMITS RALLY (Occoquan Regional Park, 9751 Ox Rd, Lorton, VA 22079). Check-in opens at 4pm. Come early and enjoy the beautiful river park. At 5pm we'll meet at the Turning Point Suffragist Memorial for a celebration of the power of women and the vote. Then we'll parade across the street to beautiful River View for the Summer of Summits Rally. We'll have a picnic supper at 7:15, and then resume again for a Hold the Line / #KeepVABlue Program. The event ends at 9:30pm.

We will be in Harrisonburg from July 23-24 and then in Virginia Beach from August 13-15. There will be many more virtual events you can attend as well and VA Justice Dems wants you to be there with us.

[Check out and get your tickets here. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9c0220927e&e=76fc145c69)

In Solidarity,
Virginia Justice Democrats
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9922f43d4c&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")
---
| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. [Become a sustaining donor for just $5/month. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b8fca1970c&e=76fc145c69)_

| _Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats.

Then we'll parade across the street to beautiful River View for the Summer of Summits Rally. We'll have a picnic supper at 7:15, and then resume again for a Hold the Line / #KeepVABlue Program. The event ends at 9:30pm. We will be in Harrisonburg from July 23-24 and then in Virginia Beach from August 13-15. There will be many more virtual events you can attend as well and VA Justice Dems wants you to be there with us. In Solidarity, Virginia Justice Democrats | "DONATE NOW" | Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. | Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats. If someone forwarded you this email, up here to get updates from Follow us on social media and visit our website at | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | Our mailing address is: 43607 McDowell Sq Leesburg, VA 20176 Want to change how you receive these emails? ---
| | | Dear Peter, Worthless RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger are condemning me for asking who executed Senior Airman Ashli Babbitt. That’s how you know I’m on your side.
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b088dd6766&e=645b3b1338) **[Those two fake Republicans voted to impeach President Trump in defiance of the Constitution](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=57f595e793&e=645b3b1338). ** Cheney and Kinzinger support the imprisonment and solitary confinement of Trump supporters -- being held without bail -- in D.C. for trespassing at the Capitol. They support the coverup of Senior Airman Babbitt’s murder. That’s because they hate the America First movement, they hate me, and they hate you. But I don’t care. Those RINO babies can cry and moan all they want. But they’re not going to stop our groundswell effort to hold the perpetrators for the violence on January 6th accountable. **[Click here to sign your “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition that we will use to inundate Congress](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0a64f66a41&e=645b3b1338).**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4c2faa9128&e=645b3b1338 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
| [**After you sign, please forward this petition to at least five of your patriotic friends and family to sign before our hearing deadline**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1e5d892c17&e=645b3b1338). If losers like Cheney and Kinzinger spent half as much time fighting Democrats as they do fighting real Patriots like you and me, the GOP would be in a much better place. But they’d rather lose. Their corporate donors and D.C. Swamp backers demand that they cave to globalism instead of serving the fine Americans who elected them. **I am not like them. ** You might remember that President Trump called me a “warrior” when he endorsed me. [**I’m in the trenches demanding justice for Ashli Babbit and all United States Service Members**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8125f080b6&e=645b3b1338). [_**So please, if you OPPOSE the federal government _‘COVERING UP THE MURDER OF ASHLI BABBIT,’_ please sign your EMERGENCY PETITION right now**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=636beca5b4&e=645b3b1338)! But I need your support right away. The Kinzinger and Cheney types in D.C. -- donor owned and operated globalist elites who hate the America First movement, President Trump, and regular folks like you and me -- are going all-in to defeat me. They’ve openly said I’m one of their biggest targets. [**That's why it's vital you take action**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=11d792d0f5&e=645b3b1338). [**Sign your petition and chip in $10 or $20 to help us keep the petition printers humming**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=107a7e7142&e=645b3b1338). Thanks -- in advance -- for your action and support. Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=bc4d0774ca&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** Weak RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger are condemning me. Their policies have been a disaster for the American people, so I wear it as a badge of honor.

But the RINOs in D.C. are going to fight hard to take me out, because I support the America First movement -- [**sign your petition right away to demand justice for Ashli Babbitt and all United States service members**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=878b7678cc&e=645b3b1338). .

| Friends, Randy Feenstra has been a thorn in Nancy Pelosi’s side this Congress. Why? **_Because he won’t go along with her radical, socialist agenda._** **__** Randy brings a lot of Iowa commonsense to Congress. During his first few months in Congress, Randy has been a leader on the issues that matter the most – protecting life, defending Iowa farmers, stopping Biden’s wasteful spending and securing our border. Not only has Randy traveled to each of the 39 counties in Iowa’s 4th Congressional District – he’s also traveled to the border to see the Biden Border Crisis firsthand - **something Kamala Harris _refuses_ to do.** It’s easy to see that Randy delivers for his constituents, and he’s part of a strong team working to fire Nancy Pelosi and win back the house majority. But, we need your help. Randy has my full support, and he needs yours too. Can I count on you to stand with Randy today and help us win back the majority in ’22?
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: We can't go backwards
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ec56e9b8ee46/we-cant-go-backwards?e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hey Derek-

We can't afford to go backwards now. We have made so much forward progress over the past 4 years here in Virginia and in the US. Now that we have a Democratic President, we can't sit back and become complacent.

In Virginia, we have to fight against both complacency and the Republican Ticket. If given the opportunity, Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares along with Minority Leader Todd Gilbert would take us back decades when it comes to voting rights, reproductive rights, economic justice, and environmental justice. We can't let that happen. Virginians can't afford it.
[Chip](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e6c28b5fe1&e=76fc145c69)[ in Now to Help Push Progressive Change](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ef63611acf&e=76fc145c69)
We also can't just bank on the messaging of "it could be worse" under Republican control. Let's get out there and show Virginians how Democrats can deliver on the issues that affect them everyday. From calling on Congress to pass the PRO Act and the American Jobs Plan to pushing for Progressives to be elected in the House of Delegates here in Virginia to deliver at the state level, we have so many opportunities to continue our good work.

[Let's get to work!](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=88b6da5433&e=76fc145c69)[ Can you help now by giving $5, $10, $25, or $100 now to help promote this message throughout Virginia? ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=0782543d18&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Harry’s Razors canceled us
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c254%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7zwL8RVScQwQU5dqEtbaeA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4537%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uaur3grdZXPHIylWyDU3NQ&sysid=1) Hi there, **_The leftists are continuing their witch hunt for conservative voices._** Recently, a Twitter user went after Harry’s Razors for sponsoring _The Michael Knowles Show_. Without evidence, that Twitter user complained that Michael Knowles was spreading “homophobic and transphobic content” and shamed Harry’s for being our sponsor. The tweet did not go viral. It did not generate widespread backlash. As of this email, that tweet has less than 150 likes, barely a blip in the scope of Twitter and customer complaints in general. But Harry’s didn’t miss a beat. They immediately condemned Michael Knowles and ended their long-term relationship with _The Michael Knowles Show_ and The Daily Wire -- in a tweet of their own. **We were proud to advertise and partner with them for years, and quite frankly don’t care that Harry’s Razors doesn’t share our values of individual thought.** **_Economic decisions shouldn’t be political decisions! _** But, the radical left is trolling the internet for old clips, hoping they can force our sponsors to back out and ultimately make us financially insolvent. If the woke mob really cared about humans, they would also condemn companies like Disney, Nike, Starbucks, and many more who receive money from a country that places individuals in “re-education camps” for having different religious beliefs. The hypocrisy is unreal! **_We’re living in a world where leftists have insincere and biased beliefs. This is one of the many reasons why we created The Daily Wire, and we would love for you to be a part of history in the making!_** At The Daily Wire, we are building a cancel-proof outlet for conservative views and opinion, and the only way we can do that -- without relying on sponsors who put radical political agendas above all else -- is to build a massive army of subscribers and voices. **[Join us at The Daily Wire and see censor-free content with your subscription. Use code HARRYS to gain 20% off a new membership.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4538%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=67TXb2rQ9xpTRoEvBmFbTQ&sysid=1)** [**Become a Member!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4539%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wrkGIoX5qQ4m3RA5PMnQTw&sysid=1) Harry’s Razors would rather be seen as “ideologically pure” to the far left than promote their razors to an audience who holds different values. This company chose to **CONDEM** our platform-- and thus our audience -- after we’ve been **PROMOTING** their product for years. **[Join The Daily Wire as a member today and help us become “cancel-proof” against sponsors who want to side with radicals and shut us down.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4530%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e8lAaXSzDB0TzbJUGzAb6Q&sysid=1)** Besides conservative news and opinions, you’ll have full access to my new show Debunked, which has episodes airing every Friday that consist of me exposing leftist fallacies. Plus, you can watch Candace Owens as she delves into the political and cultural issues of the day with her signature blend of intelligence and humor. Her show, _Candace_ , features celebrity interviews and panel discussions with the world’s most influential thought leaders and cultural mavens. **[Help me say, “see ya” to Harry’s Razors by securing your Daily Wire membership for 20% off with the code HARRYS.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4531%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jap27c9L7D538CH7r4UmOg&sysid=1) ** Ben Ben Shapiro The Daily Wire [**Become a Member!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4539%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wrkGIoX5qQ4m3RA5PMnQTw&sysid=1)
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c254%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7zwL8RVScQwQU5dqEtbaeA&sysid=1)_

But Harry’s didn’t miss a beat. They immediately condemned Michael Knowles and ended their long-term relationship with The Michael Knowles Show and The Daily Wire -- in a tweet of their own. We were proud to advertise and partner with them for years, and quite frankly don’t care that Harry’s Razors doesn’t share our values of individual thought. Economic decisions shouldn’t be political decisions! But, the radical left is trolling the internet for old clips, hoping they can force our sponsors to back out and ultimately make us financially insolvent. If the woke mob really cared about humans, they would also condemn companies like Disney, Nike, Starbucks, and many more who receive money from a country that places individuals in “re-education camps” for having different religious beliefs. The hypocrisy is unreal! We’re living in a world where leftists have insincere and biased beliefs. This is one of the many reasons why we created The Daily Wire, and we would love for you to be a part of history in the making! At The Daily Wire, we are building a cancel-proof outlet for conservative views and opinion, and the only way we can do that -- without relying on sponsors who put radical political agendas above all else -- is to build a massive army of subscribers and voices. Harry’s Razors would rather be seen as “ideologically pure” to the far left than promote their razors to an audience who holds different values. This company chose to CONDEM our platform-- and thus our audience -- after we’ve been PROMOTING their product for years. Besides conservative news and opinions, you’ll have full access to my new show Debunked, which has episodes airing every Friday that consist of me exposing leftist fallacies. Plus, you can watch Candace Owens as she delves into the political and cultural issues of the day with her signature blend of intelligence and humor. Her show, Candace , features celebrity interviews and panel discussions with the world’s most influential thought leaders and cultural mavens. Ben Ben Shapiro The Daily Wire 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

Peter,

I’m a lifelong Long Islander who’s love for my family oriented community inspired me to get involved in politics.

Now, I’m a proud freshman member of the 117th Congress, and it’s been an honor to serve alongside my fellow Republican freshmen.

I’ve seen firsthand in my district how hard the Democrats’ tax hikes have hurt families and local businesses. Beloved restaurants are closing their doors, and families who have thrived on Long Island for generations are now drowning in taxes.

Republican freshmen are fighting for the families and small businesses that are the backbone of our country, and we need your help.

Congressman Richard Hudson’s Freshman Firewall Fund will defend the Freshman Class in Congress, which means other funds can be spent to take back the House from the radical Nancy Pelosi.

**Can I count on you to contribute to the Freshman Firewall Fund to help retain our Freshman class and retake the Conservative Majority in the House?**

name: Roger Misso
subject: Matt Gaetz basically calls the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff a coward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Matt Gaetz, who famously [wasn't convicted for a DUI thanks to his politician father](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/VJpCPeyiuPUY6_m2SC3YoiugBC4xwKic-DGKEDNSDEM=), recently called into question the leadership of Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. Army General Mark Milley, who has served for decades and deployed into harm's way numerous times to defend Matt Gaetz's dilettante rear end, was giving [this](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/D9wuDpV5VRvsYaLHA-LJJaiyaTdCtFhvb1kJvBR3iIk=?s=20) impassioned response to a question about rooting out white supremacists and extremists from our military.

Gaetz responded to Chairman Milley's courage by saying, _" With generals like this it's no wonder we've fought considerably more wars than we've won."_ Yes...[he really said that.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/kk8YN8Dk5STYUrS59AJkS91_Brc5udKK41H9e1HbQ8k=?s=20)

Of course, Gaetz could have signed up to fight in those wars if he really gave a damn about defending our country. But he only cares about selling his brand: a toxic blend of crappy Pomade and pathological lies about "personal responsibility" without actually taking any responsibility himself.

Our work to [_**elect veterans and military family members of integrity**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/DvmLy8hmMLs8yn4IhRA2iWredw9qX9RgzVbJfJS9Koc=) to Congress has never been more important. Sadly, Gaetz represents military servicemembers and their families at bases like Naval Air Station Pensacola and the Air Force's Hurlburt Field. We need to stand up and defend them by electing leadership of courage and character.

So we're setting out a challenge: [_**we are matching every dollar you give TONIGHT - up to $5,000 - to recruiting and supporting good veterans to run against failures like Matt Gaetz.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/DvmLy8hmMLs8yn4IhRA2iWredw9qX9RgzVbJfJS9Koc=) And we're not stopping there: [_**if we can raise $10,000 tonight, we will physically fly down to Florida and hold a rally with our fellow veterans to stand up to Matt Gaetz.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/DvmLy8hmMLs8yn4IhRA2iWredw9qX9RgzVbJfJS9Koc=) Every. Dollar. Counts!

Step up with us tonight to [**send a message**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/DvmLy8hmMLs8yn4IhRA2iWredw9qX9RgzVbJfJS9Koc=) that America won't stand for Matt Gaetz's attacks on our military, our veterans, and their families any longer!

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/di7vj8G_Lhe-bxbXgLncr-l4ZC80pJePMrtKXaSR5hs=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/y2Up_ouZ9548kRKkDGQ5ipChRTuVYkaB5MNd8s--7lk= "https://act.myngp.com/el/oXaGRa0Ai_plC8mH-7E0aEQtuJ-p_IlaNCwbPIL7i5I=/y2Up_ouZ9548kRKkDGQ5ipChRTuVYkaB5MNd8s--7lk=").

Fellow American,

**We can’t let Joe Biden add a liberal activist to the Supreme Court of the United States.**

Mitch McConnell recently said that if he was Majority Leader in 2024 under Joe Biden and there was a Supreme Court vacancy, he would NOT fill it.

name: David Schweikert
subject: We will not be silenced
body:
Fellow American, It’s no secret that Big Tech companies are continuing to prop up the Left’s ideals. They control information with the direct intention of silencing the ideas of conservative Americans like you and me. But enough is enough. **Your ideas are important.********Your beliefs are important.********Your values are important.** Big Tech and the Democrats cannot be allowed to suppress conservative voices. It is entirely unconstitutional. **[If you agree, I hope you will join me in breaking up Big Tech with a donation of $10 or more today.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW--z8gweI5FU5K8B42W4pbsMrWFxWVyQPsbbDnTG-9bAIkaHn_JxWzcFit6H8PHPAv5BaFPxj3q-JGb9wjXd8qXUFdVFL1QtQygyiSYOl_y0qO5VyPUlPsjGY8EnA3lAw5u8u0bPqKk5nX4kmph8kcZwDb6CjspJAZ2JYTkUUIPmZ4uQJo0PkoW4kXrpViakveWcxw1DWTFGM5ZJfnPPS_1jHKw10v6_fk_yGUph7bcr_xWlpSk8JGJ3FrP44Tcp4kHbw6yLE-95WBD6kZDcLAtUZgWGsRgY-CaF7L50Em-ZCKjsg-4s3fKNKUhipEw9qw%3D%3D)** Twitter, Amazon, Facebook, Apple, Google – these Big Tech monopolies don’t just have allies in powerful places like the White House. They are run by some of the richest people in the world. That’s why support from grassroots conservative patriots like you is so important. **[Your support of $10, $20, $50, or more goes a long way in fighting back against the reign of Big Tech.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW--z8gweI5FU5K8B42W4pbsMrWFxWVyQPsbbDnTG-9bAIkaHn_JxWzcFit6H8PHPAv5BaFPxj3q-JGb9wjXd8qWZEWIv0pkj7yH7xVlu-kCmJ1mVtamn-9xsUsC1z95Kd3myp7T65bmlF_UmpoyV40Fo6nhpRiuXSYsipwKHcrF6yFxonki5e9_zbDS_MtRu1zvpHOA4YSYXnsm-cQkxXuwxYDqAaLKjTAkarneaQiD2mUU_fKFsiay1grnAFRhgG0ianzbvMY2H0IoU-TVdQRGRVPyYGvezlYh7BR8OUtk_XZn5cqKqC6OXPRZlwujiZw%3D%3D)** [**STOP BIG TECH TODAY**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW--z8gweI5FU5K8B42W4pbsMrWFxWVyQPsbbDnTG-9bAIkaHn_JxWzcFit6H8PHPAv5BaFPxj3q-JGb9wjXd8qW8wJAeUqL4H3-8d7EuVEVgg--4ugfY-SU_4zn7zIZIDm0UKgC8C2Q67U5gbNOqrKc2PDlq_6DePDIRderwyEbFgTTpUjer5YFXXbSosotRpu2IAIx6WcbbZkIuSPZh8-X7bPyDCD44aTBLSChlwhuU6WC8d-xZHH-gZxjbBU7jqWOl1Ya7UHrd85YrZB4uh42Fog4YlbY6hdgAr3UENw0Xr8TJ5HHsec50X3WZjqlMvQ%3D%3D) These Big Tech companies may have access to millions, billions, or even trillions of dollars... But they are no match for support from patriots like you, coming together alongside your unceasing commitment to save and preserve traditional American values. The First Amendment is first in our Constitution for a reason. We cannot have a functioning republic where one side silences the other. Right now, the government doesn’t have a say in what people can think or say, and yet the radical Left is using Big Tech to skirt the Constitution and target your conservative ideas. This has to stop, and it has to stop now – we cannot have a country where the silent majority is kept silent. [**That’s why I’m asking you to join me through a donation of $10 or more in the fight to break up the Big Tech monopoly.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW--z8gweI5FU5K8B42W4pbsMrWFxWVyQPsbbDnTG-9bAIkaHn_JxWzcFit6H8PHPAv5BaFPxj3q-JGb9wjXd8qVMEavX65mM_r3PtpVdO2nziImf9FggZIIpTFkNu4IHNqLXojJwKzWuvJoZE-iz5psjhh0jn7IokjA6SHdFu8HzUylRY_JIjdTezsPtNG5CBAqFfAIKAZj0uxzBVc40m_1m42omb016OKhzQDlvbQM54a5zkblG6li3srq7yNirW9GX8WwYdiSYZY9Two5S7FARKfYHMq5rmIQSawOUIuKaGt7TsSImuj1ybv1xS3Y8DA%3D%3D) The one hope we have left is grassroots conservative patriots like you rallying together and putting up a united front against this violation of our rights. For America, David Schweikert Arizona's Conservative [**JOIN TEAM SCHWEIKERT TODAY >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW--z8gweI5FU5K8B42W4pbsMrWFxWVyQPsbbDnTG-9bAIkaHn_JxWzcFit6H8PHPAv5BaFPxj3q-JGb9wjXd8qWn3IsQS0isKfQboFUBTX5f5Sj3qD_kmZky3NkAOp2MFE3A5NLrXiBZGD4mx-W0gb_t7EMjaxpLQ-sElxZLT5LYblkkY9ybx_0TJ2pIwrePbii6l8yqZNJQ9kvD0y0RZlvbUBJWaDm2qwiiWXqq8HPzZ5MYDDczNzAkgaQg3VWhlSnBXaEcg7JmPxOtcANGNS8LsOIRhI5fZ9q6ql5dA9sRWXbx9FZ80Ino0hXLBtlxag%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW-YLf9OOpr2S1WpUnujssRMdtUjonCZ6VEX6XRqavpCS0B1m9nc8icQ41lw1vOZsJ2iSfs6aEuezeVYYQV_9A_mTBRlNQSAcE5y4NX4e4jmGZ_YR-Xd1Nc6Pe2fOnWPxLSvk2vLBcvc1CvxYM2gHYHkpl73LywdYP6N3f-sfpcoFruAEf3GQvjFKHApbRTbnFxRHReFJeuEgWruXkAqij9Q_sIJmtMLUWQr6EN5AIehFJl8Gi8zopXCs0Soi4V43r3p4AOiKn7vxkjE18LRY20U%3D) | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW7Xceoxu7iiVNZETYHiOxN6Io0q9FIYrpGYwve7kXIwcbshDjGCT0J9XDQ4EmsiN7HB5mhKogdWqeuzQ8GB2Ul3OiDtULs3icfgSw1rgGK_CUrfEoRzVKzjQ8JFXetKFkITq1sPoVNlCeIKhXMT__BUu9pXuKOu985x8uREdB5M8GIb-ME01xipaxHqSKwPiU6uj_GC7kN53YhOSNsOtqtDKpSO1nNgJ78aJ7oy1KaCyyRWajc1JEu02rRR0EFWkPMY1aNNoBTbs06PlR3i9-fJqj99ffueuP2RS71kIet8E) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=9bb009e1b2da4164a46b57a8b0023f50&_e=EobxS0BVZ66zaxA6-VbkW3yhrgQ_mC3w--NhnOo_T-rHhCQwUNLdZmb2n8l5E8mh6pJi81nJ2k9037-hzTewHVMP3VstTwhou_wrPGWssn0SEOptweuPALbQzOxGC14hoobzu5cThNrjbAtnYB5h3zs3GvTdteBKE2qgqPV2iJ0bUqRgn9xr24PsCMLXGGhsNrdiQ2PnFve-oEaQsbmps2Q6v6sbAgDwDpcsNK_7uYxpVitnpJNfkG8Zx3cLi23OGOp9qfxlqIN9qFSDsIVRLNP4E7_aUyUY230SXhezjk7kcFPR5IAcF0iKFXx-YE6k)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Our response to the tragedy in Surfside
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends—

I was heartbroken to learn about the tragic building collapse in Surfside early this morning. I’ve been monitoring the situation, and all of us have kept the victims and their families in our prayers.

I’m also incredibly grateful to all the Miami-Dade first responders who risked their own lives and safety to respond to this crisis and rescue the victims. We owe them all a debt of gratitude for their heroism.

We can all help in the response to this crisis. The Shul of Bal Harbour has set up an emergency fund to directly assist victims and their families. If you’re able to support their efforts, please click here to donate. [https://thechesedfund.com/shulofbalharbour/miamitragedy] The Miami Foundation has also partnered with the Coral Gables and Key Biscayne Community Foundations to set up a relief fund, which you can support by clicking here. [https://supportsurfside.org/]

Thank you for joining me in supporting these critical relief efforts.

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148

clean_body: Dear Friends— I was heartbroken to learn about the tragic building collapse in Surfside early this morning. I’ve been monitoring the situation, and all of us have kept the victims and their families in our prayers. I’m also incredibly grateful to all the Miami-Dade first responders who risked their own lives and safety to respond to this crisis and rescue the victims. We owe them all a debt of gratitude for their heroism. We can all help in the response to this crisis. The Shul of Bal Harbour has set up an emergency fund to directly assist victims and their families. If you’re able to support their efforts, please click here to donate. [] The Miami Foundation has also partnered with the Coral Gables and Key Biscayne Community Foundations to set up a relief fund, which you can support by clicking here. [] Thank you for joining me in supporting these critical relief efforts. With Gratitude, Nikki Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Peter,
Democrats have become champions of lawlessness, and as a result, violent crime is on the rise in cities all across the nation.

_**The "defund the police" movement has made life more dangerous for everyday Americans. **_

I won’t sit by and watch law enforcement take the blame for the problems that Democrats have enabled.

I am introducing legislation that puts 100,000 new cops on the streets, increases penalties for assaults on police, as well as other new safeguards and protections.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=68895511917d447fb587e7067594ed91&_e=6EqgBt0n9pGzUYNRZZdHAfiJKRMkwRlP3JgHxNkidVydrqUzdN1Sz9BzZBNHGhZw4PZmGjKW30L1ns9qKF9MJXofO7-TUXBc2O6iNYHvz-Q1d9fr8RTq2axPLZbvRW-IQ-J15aWM8gLyMTai4gtpYtSCJBzqfpvjAPlCdoY9bhqIyFV5AFR0_RR9Ib-KSK0TcGO-DRn_LVOX5Ce6JLcfwb8-xEcji0QqoTCUixqf2kDn7-RR8PW8k4LWQj7dp3BK0qhDJuYyrBuoaEbInBiMDD6Z0ClhRWmLXnqCzKrw1qxUWN1CINbf8_rJa_Fx3NnDsn3gEWj-PSU7Y7WciQSWwhkBnDsAmlZEfYrOac_9ejXPU8XV9F6Pg7qLU5NZfjbKbpMgXrNNvRmN-ZGBoN0YKQ%3D%3D)
The liberal elite will continue to hide behind private security, high fences, and sturdy gates, everyday Americans bear the burden of a violent society.

_**Just more hypocrisy from the left!**_

Democrats have bowed down to the violent mobs that have burned swaths of American cities and demonized the very men and women sworn to protect law and order.

It’s no wonder police departments across the nation are shrinking at a record pace.

_**I am fighting for our law enforcement heroes**_ , the men, and women who put themselves in harm's way every day, serving and protecting their communities.

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Electing True Representation
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Washington's 3rd Congressional District is becoming the focus of national attention as the 2022 election season heats up. This election poses questions every citizen should be asking. Who will best represent my vision for America? Who will address the concerns of my community in the national dialogue?

America was built around the idea of representation-- local citizens who would go to Washington DC and voice local concerns and local issues on the national platform. Somehow we've evolved into something quite different when someone like Hillary Rodham Clinton buys a home in New York in order to represent the interests of New Yorkers in the United States Senate.

Locally, we have seen several candidates suddenly appear in Washington's 3rd District with hopes of being elected to Congress. Opportunistic at best, these candidates have no history and no connection to those they seek to represent. While some have experience in Washington DC and others have experience in foreign countries only one has any significant experience in the 3rd Congressional District.

Heidi St. John has lived and worked in the heart of our district for nearly 20 years, serving our community. All seven of her children still live in the district including her married, adult children and her grandchildren. Her heart will always be here. She is one of us.

To be elected to speak on behalf of friends and neighbors is a high honor and not to be taken lightly. Only Heidi St John is one of us. We know her and she knows us. We have benefited from her leadership in the 3rd District for years, and we know she will represent our concerns and be our voice when she is elected.

America has enough political opportunists in Washington DC already.

To learn more about Heidi St John and to learn how to support her campaign, visit[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q2icKojQrnTIrwBeFyAiKsQxKx4gBCHIAtHPMKy_T48KBDi3rL5y0dB0obeub14m8bSbUA2ubjnE3qyE4Wy3tPyLhQIt3wnKc3Pw1ZwRWTMYk3mo9Jmdqap3RzvzZ_PkJ8PpjQvveh2DG2vdtFsYhHztaDur8156gHRuYPRQdcw=&c=-RhbxvCZhGpsSuLL8yjRyZX0jjuFGumynz7tQhcObkj58bFpeuCVwg==&ch=CPu7OR-FF92x_9ud5pmZs3VvVRYdTWytp4PD9cdC9wAkMm2RdDKFGw==)[www.heidistjohnforcongresss.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q2icKojQrnTIrwBeFyAiKsQxKx4gBCHIAtHPMKy_T48KBDi3rL5y0dB0obeub14m8bSbUA2ubjnE3qyE4Wy3tPyLhQIt3wnKc3Pw1ZwRWTMYk3mo9Jmdqap3RzvzZ_PkJ8PpjQvveh2DG2vdtFsYhHztaDur8156gHRuYPRQdcw=&c=-RhbxvCZhGpsSuLL8yjRyZX0jjuFGumynz7tQhcObkj58bFpeuCVwg==&ch=CPu7OR-FF92x_9ud5pmZs3VvVRYdTWytp4PD9cdC9wAkMm2RdDKFGw==).

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Before our guns are gone...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
President Biden is determined to take away more of our rights.

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=7ce4f2e327fd4fe4aa811990f2a86029&_e=QjKKDFuBPXh0OUbkrEU9LwZpamFOuTK9stvsshKb1aNbv59jmOzmpnMLFDFBywK0R6psE7OqGdf8BAyDcxk_D2GLZ2RsWf_Au_YrVr2AXnBmk8kO6_gga-C6e717vh6wLeTpp5Jh1nPDBN3g_v6N9OQVmI1Tzm-MbcPeP-pJYkuYJeGzyYY8w_jxF-gHuunAmnHh9xF6eny0CM0XpB0PYQ4afsTS0tHupekNqfwCpN6JkZaoGngjJXicEleaVPHrftasOT3VnpXLHzxYsXvh3BN7NPWBZPSbaQ_dU51xu8xc0fi6HFolGlQ2CxKSFr0ahRFnIbAqb99ZRrFJfhzbU99JPaPGxRLUSvgxlreGrYsVRvdOTuzqG-WZBgpbBD-uAXumH7_QSLdNk5wplzHw-TZ__wsdJ7D-WQeS8ka_6MxHdFt6wzThqzABpGdOm_JI)
---
Friends,

President Biden is once again making moves to strip Americans of their **Constitutional rights** , and his decision to nominate David Chipman as head of the ATF proves he’ll stop at nothing to take away your Second Amendment rights!

**The Truth:** There is no one more hostile to the rights of American gun owners than Chipman, and his goal is explicit: **ban AR-15s and confiscate your guns! **

And we’ve got to stop them! Whatever you donate will be **_DOUBLED_** by a group of 2nd Amendment donors from _NOW UNTIL MIDNIGHT._ **DONATE TO KEEP AMERICANS SAFE.**

What is America without our Constitutional rights? As I’ve said, American gun owners and manufacturers have been left in the dark for **_far too long with closed-door rule changes by the ATF._**

Biden and his liberal supporters have no respect for American gun owners or the Second Amendment. We cannot give Democrats control of the ATF.

I am determined to do whatever it takes to ensure Biden and his cronies will not violate our freedoms -- but I can’t do this without your help. **_[Defend the America we know and love. We can do this together.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=7ce4f2e327fd4fe4aa811990f2a86029&_e=QjKKDFuBPXh0OUbkrEU9LwZpamFOuTK9stvsshKb1aNbv59jmOzmpnMLFDFBywK0R6psE7OqGdf8BAyDcxk_D2GLZ2RsWf_Au_YrVr2AXnBmk8kO6_gga-C6e717vh6wLeTpp5Jh1nPDBN3g_v6N9OQVmI1Tzm-MbcPeP-pJYkuYJeGzyYY8w_jxF-gHuunAmnHh9xF6eny0CM0XpB0PYbWrHYY0fSebhS7pJksQoOzMhzSsx6qZcy5dnMJzg1Rpz9jWuEuVaw0ZlVHLGR0HIFs3ANii2_yvlxp9qYeuqjp7OPve60Aql09L94QWSCbPFghk80uxXinbxx56_hsMyoRnsrlF3sCS0w8Gt3A72DvjRrPj0i36VhA-4wRD_w2ErqHJzcOHhPMxPuBwheW054svIXAIbDkwNGXiOj4BWwdv3u7xAq4LjKj6QA5Ddf2q)_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: VP Kamala is going to the border, Jim Jordan calls out big tech and more...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3ae185d8fb64/vp-kamala-is-going-to-the-border-jim-jordan-calls-out-big-tech-and-more?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Jim Jordan calls out Microsoft: Do you believe in free speech?
I’ve been out on military leave this week, but Lyndsay, Tom Basille and the team on _Spicer & Co_ have doing a great job, check out some great segments they’ve done:Rep Jim Jordan joined _Spicer & Co_ to discuss his letter to Microsoft about the censorship of conservatives, watch:
| | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b5686128c1&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Yesterday, Joe Biden spoke on the recent crime increase in cities across America and advocated for stricter gun laws to combat it. Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis from New York reacts, watch:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f7e49410ce&e=f6564bbe3b)
Senator Steve Daines also responds:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b16967ac9f&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## Vice President Harris is set to visit the border...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7e52b056e3&e=f6564bbe3b)
Vice President Kamala Harris [announced](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=56a9fbbbee&e=f6564bbe3b) this week, that she will join the Homeland Security Secretary on a trip to the border on Friday. This comes on the heels of a visit that President Trump will also be making with Texas Governor Greg Abbott.
| | | |
---
## Stories worth reading...
[‘Redneck Rave' in Kentucky descends into CHAOS after a man has his throat slit, a woman is choked in a fight over a blanket and a man is impaled on a log - leading to charges for 48 people](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=774c80de12&e=f6564bbe3b) — Emily Crane for _The Daily Mail_ Just wow, thats all I’ve got to say on that one... [Biden administration removes Rodney Scott as head of U.S. Border Patrol ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ae997e8c39&e=f6564bbe3b)— Nick Miroff in _The Washington Post_ “Biden administration removes Rodney Scott as head of U.S. Border Patrol..Scott, a 29-year veteran, published a statement on social media Wednesday saying he had received a letter offering him the option to resign, retire or relocate."[BuzzFeed Nears Deal to Go Public Via SPAC, Eyeing Digital-Media Rollup](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a77955b3f3&e=f6564bbe3b) — Benjamin Mullen in _The Wall Street Journal_ Will be interesting to see how _The New York Times_ ’ Ben Smith, formerly of _BuzzFeed_ , covers this...
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if VP Kamala Harris would announce her trip to the border before President Trump went, [most people said no](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=da761ed477&e=f6564bbe3b). Well now she’s going tomorrow, my question is:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=890b81ae35&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ebce6815a9&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
I spent my Father’s Day at the beach enjoying the latest from one of my favorite authors, Joel Rosenberg. Joel is an Israel expert, but also writes a great political thriller, check it out. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=939bc455f7&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---

| | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=791920ef46&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8273f17824&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=23d847a9a9&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=16c7e9fdd8&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](mailto:contact@seanspicer.com)

subject: They don’t want us in Cleveland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bikers for Trump**
body:
We have only 2 days to mobilize every Bike across the Country to get them in Cleveland to stop voter intimidation or violent harassment. We have only 2 days to mobilize every Bike across the Country to get them in Cleveland to stop voter intimidation or violent harassment. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=69c40b4a42c7484e81bd6708ab5000bf&_e=hH0flA4i5jpfNxIDiqtx28ItUPSjs0p5mU6f4HxyCC4HnHS62NSw-qj2fT3rRkuk0yGB9dQHMsS4zeMzMWGk0pp_VYE3F92r75Y7XzhbRo7lHygpMzFTWrRGfYcKUKTf65HTNVxUe0EzZ45Q5i-hRAPm8x7gFhoy6MUpwu92le0mTmHCIzvIVAAyGh8WET4t8DH_iyZEfRtM0OfaVucYkmCcl1pWhQs--7LjmQ1Fb_jw30pdSKqBa-GVqaUTB-H2Pvc1gh5rEY1FIXtbEqx6L1WaKlgD3Nce8x2E3Hf5HYhgH3YlgeUcuRnu3y2AJxTmNzaq6JAJuTc9tgDXx_c0A3L7X98PaZITbpTQJiKlRiIswSktxAmXM3s3FAb8VNn9dzGrbrxlpeTDkdRkfMyFiVWwcwlau5WO0vR6tE8sR-SX0V-0Hno-faL2dgZeweetfKBjRJWG5hU4iD5ujeaXqx0OKvqHL-NoBQ29TNpWNdw%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

We were there in 2016 when ANTIFA and BLM rioters threatened to shut down President Trump’s speech in Cleveland for the Republican Convention.

They burned cars, smashed windows, and destroyed businesses to stop President Trump and terrify his supporters.

You know what we did? Bikers for Trump stood tall, showing the rioters we weren’t going to let Trump’s supporters be intimidated or assaulted. And because of the support from our Bikers, thousands of Trump supporters felt safe to rally behind President Trump giving him the momentum he needed to defeat Hillary!

**Now ANTIFA and BLM are at it AGAIN! They’re mobilizing to stop President Trump at his first rally of 2021 in Cleveland!!**

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Behind the Scenes: Visiting the U.S.-Mexico Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
So much of what you see about elected officials and candidates is filtered through a biased media that twists words and narratives, and isn’t interest Peter,

So much of what you see about elected officials and candidates is filtered through a biased media that twists words and narratives, and isn’t interested in understanding the real story. As we move forward, I want to make sure you get an authentic, behind the scenes look at my time in the White House and now on the campaign trail - straight from me and my team. Let’s start at a place the Biden-Harris administration is neglecting: the U.S.-Mexico border. \-- One of the things we finalized over a weekend at Camp David was for President Trump to take a trip to the border to make his case for the wall. Prior to the president’s border visit, we also planned for the president to deliver his first nationally televised Oval Office address to the country on the shutdown and border crisis. I worked with all of the major television networks to nail down a block of prime time for the president to give his address Tuesday night ahead of the border visit.

The next morning I went to Stephen Miller’s second-floor office and worked directly with him, Jared Kushner, and Derek Lyons on the address. We spent the next several hours going in and out of the back dining room of the Oval Office, consulting with the president and writing and rewriting. We must have gone back and forth a half-dozen times. The president wanted to open his first Oval Office address to the country with a list of his economic accomplishments. We recommended he keep his remarks focused on the crisis at the border and his solution to it. Still unresolved, we took a break.

That night the president walked down the colonnade to deliver his first Oval Office address. He sat at the Resolute desk with pictures of his parents and the American and presidential flags behind him. Only the pool television network and a few senior staff were present in the room. I held my breath as the clock struck 9:00 p.m. and the president began his remarks to the country. We had won the debate on the opening, and I still have the first page of that draft where we got to strike through it with the words VICTORY written in all red caps at the top of the page. _Tonight, I am speaking to you because there is a growing humanitarian and security crisis at our southern border...._
The next day I attended a meeting in the Cabinet Room with the president and congressional leadership. The president brought in some candy, and offered to share with Chuck and Nancy. The candy was from a place in New York that both Schumer and Trump knew well. They spent the first few minutes reminiscing about life in New York. There is a bit of friendliness between them, but it didn’t last long once the meeting got under way.

Nancy immediately asked, “Why are you hurting people with this shutdown?”

“I don’t want to hurt anybody,” said the president. “I want to protect our country and our people. We can open up the government today. You say you want border security. If we open the government today, in thirty days will you also fund border security, including the wall?”

“No,” Pelosi said.

The president calmly said, “Okay, then this is a waste of time. Bye-bye.”

The president walked out, and Pelosi lost it.

The next day I flew on Air Force One with the president to McAllen, Texas, in the Rio Grande Valley, one of the most heavily trafficked areas for illegal border crossings. At a US Border Patrol station, the president talked with the brave men and women protecting us along our southern border and with relatives of law enforcement officials killed in the line of duty by illegal immigrants in front of a cache of seized guns, drugs, and money.

CNN’s White House correspondent Jim Acosta went down ahead of President Trump to do some “investigative reporting” on the border, and posted a video of himself in front of a section of border wall: “I found some steel slats down on the border,” said Acosta. “But I don’t see anything resembling a national emergency situation, at least not in the McAllen, Texas, area of the border where Trump will be today.” I tweeted back to Acosta: “When I went with President @realDonaldTrump to the border today I never imagined @Acosta would be there doing our job for us and so clearly explaining why WALLS WORK. Thanks Jim!”
Thank you for reading, Sarah |
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Next Wednesday?
body:
Yes, far left liberals control the House, Senate and the White House.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HpMb03uq6BwOAQcTdoLDVw/CXBVNsgiz9x3Y8lczz7siQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HpMb03uq6BwOAQcTdoLDVw/CXBVNsgiz9x3Y8lczz7siQ) Yes, radical leftists control the House, Senate and the White House.

It sucks, but like anything in life, there's only one way out . . . **we have to work for it!**

So don't you dare get discouraged. If we want to get our nation on track, we have to do TWO things simultaneously during the Mid-Terms . . .
* 1\. Take back the House of Representatives.

* 2\. Hold Republicans leaders accountable to constitutional values.

Here's the good news. If you help me with #1 and get me into Congress, and I'll handle #2.

Are you in? [**Donate now and help me win.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HpMb03uq6BwOAQcTdoLDVw/CXBVNsgiz9x3Y8lczz7siQ)

**We have six days to go until the close of the quarter.**

If I don't [**hit my fundraising goals**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HpMb03uq6BwOAQcTdoLDVw/CXBVNsgiz9x3Y8lczz7siQ), the left is going to have a field day - and worse, my campaign won't have the revenue to do the heavy lifting that's required this early.

[**Will you donate today?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HpMb03uq6BwOAQcTdoLDVw/CXBVNsgiz9x3Y8lczz7siQ)

Thanks so much,

Laura Loomer

P.S. At midnight on June 30th, we hit the FEC fundraising deadline. I'm worried we won't hit our goal so [**I would really appreciate anything you can do to help**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HpMb03uq6BwOAQcTdoLDVw/CXBVNsgiz9x3Y8lczz7siQ).

name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: 3 reasons why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is important.
#
Hi! It’s Jayla, Erica’s finance director.
**I’m going to cut to the chase: In less than one week, our campaign will be facing a *public* FEC fundraising deadline.**
Right now, we’re behind on reaching our target of 500 donations before June 30, and I’m reaching out to ask if you could help us close the gap. [**You can make your first $5 donation here — but here are three reasons explaining why it’s important we reach our goal:**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210624-205&t=1&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk)
1️⃣ **There are NO Black women in the U.S. Senate.** Right now, Black and brown communities are facing the brunt of persistent injustices; we can’t make bold, transformational change in this country until we change who holds the power, and Erica is running for Senate to do just that. 2️⃣ **CNN ranked North Carolina as one of the best chances for Democrats to flip a Senate seat.** Whether or not Democrats keep control of the U.S. Senate could hinge on the outcome of our race — that why we’re campaigning statewide right now, uniting a coalition of diverse, working-class people to send a progressive champion like Erica to the Senate. 3️⃣ **Donald Trump and GOP super PACs are already involved in our race.** After Donald Trump endorsed our Republican opponent Ted Budd, a GOP super PAC raised $5 MILLION to help buy North Carolina’s open seat for Trump’s hand-picked candidate. We must raise the resources right now to fight back — and win.
---
[**With all this in mind, will you make your first $5 contribution to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate to help us reach our goal of 500 donations before our June 30 deadline?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210624-205&t=2&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk) Every donation will help show the grassroots strength of our people-powered movement and make a direct impact on our campaign.
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210624-205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk)**
Thank you for showing your support,
Jayla
Jayla Gilliam
Finance Director
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
P.S. Our FEC fundraising deadline is a *BIG* deal for our campaign — so, I made a deal with our team. [**If you make a contribution (of any amount), we will send you a FREE union-made Team Erica sticker as our way of saying thank you!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210624-205&t=22&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210624-205-footer&t=23&refcode2=205_3698_wbFTzk&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=205%2E3698%2EwbFTzk)

| Dear Patriot, Now is our chance to send a message. _For months, I've been hunting down the truth about COVID, Fauci, and the Wuhan lab._ The Biden administration has stonewalled me at every turn. But now is a golden opportunity to show them that we mean business. It's time to show all the petty bureaucrats who ruined our economy over the past year that the American people are standing up and demanding answers. That's why I need your help immediately. _You see, at the end of this month is a deadline where every Congressman and Senator will be required to show their fundraising numbers for this quarter._ The COVID mob will be watching me like a hawk. If my performance is weak, they will surely smell blood in the water. I've staked my political fortunes on this fight against Fauci and the Biden administration. How I perform at this deadline will be critically important to determining whether I'll be successful or not. The Lockdown Mafia and the Chinese Communist apologists cannot be allowed to win. [That's why I need you to contribute $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately -- to show that American patriots across this country are demanding answers.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DqCXA_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7mntYBG6H3bx-2F0nN51QEYQXE2HK9EI4SLIS-2F7AuQJHXaaz-2FCxPqCsP5Pej7Yc6A1v-2BN-2BCDwEJFmJkSpm-2BTn1u1OWioUff6lapiE0-2FCo-2BIFa4sHMRNSEvwd-2Fly1C-2BjY7sppHn-2BXtRripQ0zdEv98gDCFV2d9FLv0YSwVNCFSN54YtcTN6snMbdy63zwlHxHzUvdCEnmhzIkHusZKQVTo6z1H-2Bjgrm8T2GWqQoWTMNtR5ueWMKNr778rx1316khYmF78e5hg6rmiwExJzF-2F9NyaPo24HCM61u6uEbXSmZAottdBqX4K07lUIj5y-2FtuS13WxRxehNIAUPYyf-2FfLHM2OmjA-3D-3D) I can assure you that Anthony Fauci won't be happy if you choose to contribute. But it will have a meaningful impact on my ability to keep fighting for the truth about COVID. You can rest assured that I will continue to devote my time in the U.S. Senate to uncovering that truth, no matter what the political consequences are. _The Chinese Communist Party deserves to be exposed for their role in the origins of COVID -- not to be protected by corrupt politicians and bureaucrats._ The entire reason I was sent to the U.S. Senate was to take on powerful interests. And unlike most politicians -- I actually take my oath seriously. But if I have a weak performance at this fundraising deadline, it will embolden my enemies to target me even harder than before. [That's why I need your help so urgently. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Now is our chance to send a message. For months, I've been hunting down the truth about COVID, Fauci, and the Wuhan lab. The Biden administration has stonewalled me at every turn. But now is a golden opportunity to show them that we mean business. It's time to show all the petty bureaucrats who ruined our economy over the past year that the American people are standing up and demanding answers. That's why I need your help immediately. You see, at the end of this month is a deadline where every Congressman and Senator will be required to show their fundraising numbers for this quarter. The COVID mob will be watching me like a hawk. If my performance is weak, they will surely smell blood in the water. I've staked my political fortunes on this fight against Fauci and the Biden administration. How I perform at this deadline will be critically important to determining whether I'll be successful or not. The Lockdown Mafia and the Chinese Communist apologists cannot be allowed to win. I can assure you that Anthony Fauci won't be happy if you choose to contribute. But it will have a meaningful impact on my ability to keep fighting for the truth about COVID. You can rest assured that I will continue to devote my time in the U.S. Senate to uncovering that truth, no matter what the political consequences are. The Chinese Communist Party deserves to be exposed for their role in the origins of COVID -- not to be protected by corrupt politicians and bureaucrats. The entire reason I was sent to the U.S. Senate was to take on powerful interests. And unlike most politicians -- I actually take my oath seriously. But if I have a weak performance at this fundraising deadline, it will embolden my enemies to target me even harder than before. In Liberty, Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) | | | ****** P.S. The evidence is piling up that COVID leaked from a lab in Wuhan, and yet Biden and Fauci are stonewalling -- and protecting the Chinese Communist party. But here's the good news: we have a golden opportunity to fight back. The quarterly fundraising deadline is at the end of this month, and the COVID mob will be watching me like a hawk. Either I will show strength, and send a message that American patriots want the truth about the Wuhan lab leak ... ... or the COVID mob will exploit any weakness, like sharks chasing after blood in the water. ** | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz' Powers Ending?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Let me get straight to the point... **I just read that a deal is being struck where Walz would finally give up his Emergency Powers.** We set out on a mission to End Walz' Emergency Powers 15 months ago. No other group has put the energy, resources and pressure that our team has put into this fight. Not even the Republican Party. We've had doorknockers on the Iron Range in -30 degrees. Our team has lit dropped and knocked doors from Detroit Lakes to Winona. We've had phone callers contact voters in every senate district in the state. And we've had patriots show up to the Capitol to confront politicians face to face! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_protest_was_a_huge_success?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=2) A couple months ago we promised to make 55,000 phone calls. I'm happy to report that we are hitting that number by the end of the week! **But, we haven't solved the problem yet. As we've said for the last 15 months, first we need to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Then we have to make sure they Never Happen Again!** We are almost about to accomplish that first objective and that's because of YOU making calls, sending emails and donating to our pressure campaign! But danger lurks in the waters. Gazelka is looking to put Emergency Powers in our Constitution. We say NO WAY! Don't enshrine Emergency Powers in our Constitution. Don't etch in stone the abuse we experienced over the last 15 months. Gazelka's [Dangerous Fake End Powers Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/gazelka_pushes_dangerous_fake_end_powers_bill?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=3) would put a question on the November 2022 ballot. If it passes, it doesn't solve the problem because a simple Democrat Majority would ensure Endless Emergency Powers happen again. Even worse - If voters vote it down, Walz will proclaim that Minnesotans want him to keep his Unilateral Emergency Powers. This is a lose/lose position. **THIS IS EXTREMELY DANGEROUS! We can't let this pass.** **We need to kill this in its tracks. I'm asking for an emergency donation to STOP this Dangerous Fake End Powers Bill from passing by ramping up the pressure in the final week of the Special Session.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=4 "MAKE EMERGENCY DONATION") [MAKE EMERGENCY DONATION](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=4)
---
We are on the cusp of Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, but it will be for nothing if Gazelka passes a Dangerous Fake End Powers Bill. Only one bill solves the problem and that's **Mort's Never Again Bill**.
[**Peter, don't let Governor Walz hold onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers for good! Stop the Gazelka Constitutional Amendment. Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on the political class.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=5)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_ending&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Nina Turner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Powerful corporate interests are supporting Nina’s primary opponent.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210624-2236-header&t=1&akid=2236%2E2526796%2EIu5ICX)
Nina Turner is the real deal.
She has spent her entire career advocating for working people — on the Cleveland City Council, in the Ohio State Senate, and on Senator Bernie Sanders’ 2016 and 2020 presidential campaigns, serving as National Co-Chair in 2020.
I’m proud to have endorsed her to represent the people of Ohio’s 11th district in Congress.
This special election is heating up, and right now, powerful corporate interests are supporting Nina’s primary opponent. Like ours, her campaign is powered by the people — that means the only way we can win is with strong grassroots support.
[Please split a donation — of $3 or whatever you can — between our campaigns to help power Nina Turner to victory and strengthen our progressive coalition in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210624?refcode=em20210624-2236-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2236_2526796_Iu5ICX&akid=2236%2E2526796%2EIu5ICX)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210624?refcode=em20210624-2236-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2236_2526796_Iu5ICX&akid=2236%2E2526796%2EIu5ICX)**
Nina is exactly the kind of progressive leader we need more of in Congress.
She will be a powerful voice for policies that will make a meaningful difference in the lives of working people across this country — like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, and a Green New Deal. I need her alongside me in Congress in the fight for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice.
Your contribution will help Nina’s campaign compete in the final stretch and strengthen our fight for systemic change in our country.
[So if you can, please split a contribution to support our campaigns today. With less than two weeks until early voting begins, now is the time for us to show support for Nina and our movement. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210624?refcode=em20210624-2236-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2236_2526796_Iu5ICX&akid=2236%2E2526796%2EIu5ICX)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210624?refcode=em20210624-2236-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2236_2526796_Iu5ICX&akid=2236%2E2526796%2EIu5ICX)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210624?refcode=em20210624-2236-P&t=24&refcode2=2236_2526796_Iu5ICX&akid=2236%2E2526796%2EIu5ICX)**
